    ["sm19"] = {name="青蛇-小青", skills={{label="效果1", func="skill_sm19_1", limit="turn", desc="自己回合1回合1次，按照自己人界、地狱、天堂的“白蛇”之名神魔卡数量，每有1张就增加此卡力量值1倍，直到回合结束。"}, {label="效果2", func="skill_sm19_2", limit="turn", desc="此卡在我方人界时，我方人界其他“蛇”之名神魔卡不会被对方任何法术破坏。"}, {label="效果3", func="skill_sm19_3", limit="turn", desc="自己回合结束时可使此卡返回此卡的原持有神官牌组，然后选自己牌组另外1张冠有“青蛇”但名字不完全相同的神魔卡替代降临到人界。"}}},
    ["sm20"] = {name="诡计之神-洛基", skills={{label="效果1", func="skill_sm20_1", limit="turn", desc="自己回合1回合1次，舍弃自己1张手牌，然后随机选对方1张手牌加入自己手中。"}, {label="效果2", func="skill_sm20_2", limit="turn", desc="1回合1次，得到人界1张神魔卡的名。"}, {label="效果3", func="skill_sm20_3", limit="turn", desc="1回合1次，此卡被攻击时把攻击对象转为人界另1张神魔卡。"}}},

-- ########################################################
--  PART 4: 辅助工具函数
-- ########################################################

-- 格式化数值 (10000 -> 1.0w)
function formatK(n) 
    if not n then return "0" end
    local v=tonumber(n)
    if v>=10000 then return string.format("%.1fw",v/10000) else return tostring(v) end 
end

-- 检查是否有前排单位
function hasFrontRowUnits(p) 
    for _,c in ipairs(COMBAT_CONFIG) do 
        if c.player==p and c.row==1 then 
            local s=combat_states[c.zone]
            if s and s.active and s.is_summoned then return true end 
        end 
    end 
    return false 
end

-- 空函数 (用于禁用按钮点击)
function none() end

-- 建立区域映射缓存
function mapConfigData()
    zone_map = {}
    for _, cfg in ipairs(COMBAT_CONFIG) do zone_map[cfg.zone] = cfg end
    self.setVar("zone_map", zone_map)
end

-- 启动自检
function checkZoneValidity()
    if not getObjectFromGUID(BASE_GUID) then print("❌ 错误：找不到基底模型 "..BASE_GUID) end
    for i, cfg in ipairs(COMBAT_CONFIG) do
        if not getObjectFromGUID(cfg.zone) then print("❌ 错误：找不到神魔容器 "..cfg.zone) end
    end
end

-- [安全调用]：防止因卡牌脚本错误导致的全局崩溃
function safeCall(obj, funcName, params)
    if not obj or obj.tag ~= "Card" then return nil end
    if obj.getLuaScript() == "" then return nil end 
    
    local status, res1, res2 = pcall(function()
        return obj.call(funcName, params)
    end)
    return status and res1, res2
end

-- [安全获取变量]
function safeGetVar(obj, varName)
    if not obj or obj.tag ~= "Card" then return nil end
    local status, val = pcall(function() return obj.getVar(varName) end)
    if status then return val else return nil end
end

-- ########################################################
--  PART 5: 生命周期与回合逻辑
-- ########################################################

-- [存档]：保存关键游戏状态
function onSave()
    local data_to_save = {
        active_clones = active_clones,
        monkey_eye_pending = monkey_eye_pending,
        god_spear_decay = god_spear_decay
    }
    return JSON.encode(data_to_save)
end

-- [读档/初始化]
function onLoad(saved_data)
    -- 1. 读取存档
    if saved_data and saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        active_clones = loaded_data.active_clones or {}
        monkey_eye_pending = loaded_data.monkey_eye_pending or {}
        god_spear_decay = loaded_data.god_spear_decay or {}
    end

    -- 2. 强力清洗：移除所有手牌的残留按钮
    for _, p in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        for _, obj in ipairs(p.getHandObjects()) do
            obj.clearButtons()
        end
    end

    -- 3. 常规初始化
    mapConfigData()
    self.setVar("none", function() end) 
    createCardMonitorButtons() 
    createToggleButtons() 
    -- createDebugButton() -- [已移除] 开发者调试按钮
    
    -- 4. 启动循环
    Wait.time(gameLoop, checkInterval, -1)
    checkZoneValidity()
    print(">> 系统启动：Global v12.0 (神魔技能整合版)")
end

-- [回合开始]：重置状态、处理Buff过期、分身消失等
function onPlayerTurnStart(color)
    attacks_this_turn = {} 
    active_skill_cooldowns = {} 
    buff_registry = {}  
    
    -- 更新锁定计数
    for g, d in pairs(attack_locks) do
        attack_locks[g] = d - 1
        if attack_locks[g] <= 0 then attack_locks[g] = nil end
    end
    
    -- 处理 [分身术]：敌方分身消失
    local opponent = (color == "White") and "Green" or "White"
    local hellGUID = HELL_CONFIG[opponent]
    local hellObj = getObjectFromGUID(hellGUID)
    
    for guid, data in pairs(active_clones) do
        if data.owner == opponent then
            local card = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if card then
                if hellObj and (hellObj.tag == "Bag" or hellObj.tag == "Deck") then
                    hellObj.putObject(card)
                elseif hellObj then
                    card.setPositionSmooth(hellObj.getPosition())
                else
                    card.destruct() 
                end
            end
            active_clones[guid] = nil
        end
    end
    
    -- 处理 [火眼金睛] 回收
    if monkey_eye_pending[color] then
        broadcastToAll("🔥👀 [火眼金睛] 轮回效果触发！", {1, 0.5, 0})
        broadcastToAll("🐒 由于上次发动时借助了 [猴生肖] 的力量，\n您现在可以从 [地狱] 将火眼金睛加入手牌，以此代替本次抽卡！", {1, 1, 0})
        monkey_eye_pending[color] = nil
    end
    
    -- 处理 [战神金矛] 衰减
    for zoneGUID, state in pairs(combat_states) do
        if state.active and state.equip_guid then
            local equipObj = getObjectFromGUID(state.equip_guid)
            if equipObj and equipObj.getVar("EQUIP_ID") == 10 then
                local cGuid = state.card_guid
                local card = getObjectFromGUID(cGuid)
                god_spear_decay[cGuid] = (god_spear_decay[cGuid] or 0) + 400000
                broadcastToAll("📉 [战神金矛] 诅咒噬主！\n" .. (card and card.getName() or "装备者") .. " 攻击力下降 40w (累计 -" .. formatK(god_spear_decay[cGuid]) .. ")", {1,0,0})
            end
        end
    end

    monitorCombatZones() 
end

-- [主循环]
function gameLoop()
    checkCardCount()
    monitorSpellZones() 
    monitorCombatZones()
end

-- ########################################################
--  PART 6: 核心监控 (战场、装备、UI)
-- ########################################################

function monitorCombatZones()
    for _, config in ipairs(COMBAT_CONFIG) do
        local zone = getObjectFromGUID(config.zone)
        
        if zone then
            -- 获取上一帧记录的状态，默认 is_summoned 为 false
            local state = combat_states[config.zone] or { active=false, card_guid=nil, equip_guid=nil, is_summoned=false }
            
            -- 1. 扫描神魔
            local foundCard = nil
            for _, obj in ipairs(zone.getObjects()) do 
                if obj.tag == "Card" then 
                    foundCard = obj
                    break 
                end 
            end
            
            -- 2. 扫描装备 (保持原有逻辑)
            local currentEquipObj = nil
            local currentEquipID = nil
            local eqZone = nil
            if config.equip_zone and config.equip_zone ~= "这里填GUID" then
                eqZone = getObjectFromGUID(config.equip_zone)
                if eqZone then
                    for _, obj in ipairs(eqZone.getObjects()) do
                        local id = obj.getVar("EQUIP_ID")
                        if id then currentEquipObj = obj; currentEquipID = id; break end
                    end
                end
            end

            -- 装备变更检测
            if state.equip_guid and (not currentEquipObj or currentEquipObj.getGUID() ~= state.equip_guid) then
                local oldEquip = getObjectFromGUID(state.equip_guid)
                if oldEquip then oldEquip.clearButtons() end
                state.equip_guid = nil
            end
            updateEquipZoneUI(eqZone, currentEquipID, config.player)

            -- === 3. 核心卡牌处理 ===
            local isValidUnit = false
            
            if foundCard then
                local cGuid = foundCard.getGUID()
                local isClone = active_clones[cGuid]
                
                local base_atk = 0
                local base_hp = 0
                
                if isClone then
                    base_atk = isClone.atk
                    base_hp = isClone.hp
                    isValidUnit = true
                else
                    local varAtk = safeGetVar(foundCard, "DEFAULT_ATK")
                    local varHp = safeGetVar(foundCard, "DEFAULT_HP")
                    
                    if varAtk then
                        base_atk = varAtk
                        base_hp = varHp or 0
                        isValidUnit = true
                    else
                        local a, h = safeCall(foundCard, "getBaseStats")
                        if a then
                            base_atk = a
                            base_hp = h or 0
                            isValidUnit = true
                        end
                    end
                end

                if isValidUnit then
                    -- 【核心修复】获取该卡牌当前的实时召唤状态
                    local current_is_summoned = isCardSummoned(foundCard)
                    
                    -- 检测是否需要重新初始化UI：
                    -- 条件A: 卡牌是刚放进来的（GUID变化 或 之前不活跃）
                    local is_new_card = (not state.active or state.card_guid ~= cGuid)
                    -- 条件B: 卡牌还在格子里，但状态发生了改变（例如上一帧还没召唤，这一帧召唤成功了）
                    local status_changed = (state.active and state.is_summoned ~= current_is_summoned)

                    -- 如果满足任一条件，就强制重跑初始化逻辑
                    if is_new_card or status_changed then
                        if state.active and is_new_card then handleCardExit(state.card_guid) end
                        -- initCardLogic 内部会调用 toggleUI {show=false}，这能再次关闭卡牌自带UI
                        initCardLogic(zone, foundCard, config.grave)
                    end
                    
                    -- === 技能按钮显示 ===
                    local unitID = safeGetVar(foundCard, "UNIT_ID")
                    if not unitID then
                         -- 尝试通过名字模糊匹配
                         local cName = foundCard.getName()
                         -- [修复开始]：使用增强型匹配，忽略空格和标点符号差异
                         if cName then
                             local function cleanStr(s) return string.gsub(s, "[%s%-]", "") end -- 移除空格和横杠的辅助函数
                             local cleanCName = cleanStr(cName)
                             
                             for id, data in pairs(UNIT_DB) do
                                 local cleanDBName = cleanStr(data.name)
                                 -- 双向包含检测：只要去除符号后名字能对上，就视为匹配成功
                                 if cleanCName == cleanDBName or 
                                    string.find(cleanCName, cleanDBName, 1, true) or 
                                    string.find(cleanDBName, cleanCName, 1, true) then 
                                     unitID = id
                                     break 
                                 end
                             end
                         end
                         -- [修复结束]
                    end
                    if unitID then
                        updateUnitCardUI(foundCard, unitID, cGuid)
                    end
                    -- =====================

                    -- 计算数值 (Buff, Debuff, 装备加成)
                    local buff = buff_registry[cGuid] or {atk_add=0, atk_mult=1, hp_mult=1, flags={}}
                    local damage = damage_registry[cGuid] or 0 
                    local temp_debuff = safeGetVar(foundCard, "temp_debuff") or 0
                    
                    local final_atk = (base_atk - temp_debuff + buff.atk_add) * buff.atk_mult
                    local max_hp = math.floor(base_hp * buff.hp_mult)
                    local final_hp = max_hp - damage
                    if final_hp < 0 then final_hp = 0 end 

                    local flags = {}
                    if buff.flags then for k,v in pairs(buff.flags) do flags[k] = v end end

                    -- 装备逻辑应用
                    if currentEquipID and EQUIP_DB[currentEquipID] then
                        local eData = EQUIP_DB[currentEquipID]
                        final_atk = math.floor(final_atk * (1 + eData.pct))
                        if currentEquipID == 1 then flags.multi_attack = true end
                        if currentEquipID == 12 then 
                            flags.ignore_wall = true; flags.allow_back_row_attack = true; flags.multi_attack = true 
                        end
                        if currentEquipID == 10 then 
                            flags.instant_kill = true
                            local decay = god_spear_decay[cGuid] or 0
                            final_atk = final_atk - decay
                        end
                        if currentEquipID == 11 then
                            local req = safeCall(foundCard, "getSummonRequirements")
                            if req and req.cost then
                                local fixed_bonus = req.cost * 300000
                                final_atk = final_atk + fixed_bonus
                            end
                        end
                        updateEquipmentCardUI(currentEquipObj, currentEquipID, cGuid)
                    else
                        if currentEquipObj then currentEquipObj.clearButtons() end
                    end
                    
                    -- 更新状态记录
                    combat_states[config.zone] = { 
                        active=true, card_guid=cGuid, atk=final_atk, hp=final_hp, flags=flags, 
                        is_summoned = current_is_summoned, -- 记录当前状态以便下一帧对比
                        equip_guid = currentEquipObj and currentEquipObj.getGUID()
                    }
                    
                    -- [修复] 不要调用 setUIDisplay，因为它会重绘按钮覆盖掉技能
                    -- safeCall(foundCard, "setUIDisplay", {atk=final_atk, hp=final_hp}) 
                    
                    -- 改为直接同步变量，保持数据正确但不触发UI更新
                    foundCard.setVar("current_atk", final_atk)
                    foundCard.setVar("current_hp", final_hp)

                    updateZoneDisplay(zone, config, combat_states[config.zone])
                else
                    -- 有卡但无效 (如放错了法术卡)
                    if state.active then handleCardExit(state.card_guid) end
                    combat_states[config.zone] = { active=false, card_guid=nil, equip_guid=nil }
                    resetZoneUI(zone)
                end
            else
                -- 没卡
                if state.active then handleCardExit(state.card_guid) end
                if state.equip_guid then 
                    local old=getObjectFromGUID(state.equip_guid)
                    if old then old.clearButtons() end 
                end
                if currentEquipObj then currentEquipObj.clearButtons() end
                combat_states[config.zone] = { active=false, card_guid=nil, equip_guid=nil }
                resetZoneUI(zone)
            end
        end
    end
end



-- ########################################################
--  PART 7: 法术系统核心逻辑
-- ########################################################

-- [取消施法]：重置状态并刷新界面
function cancelSpellCast()
    if not spell_casting_state.active then return end
    
    spell_casting_state = { active = false }
    broadcastToAll("🚫 施法已取消", {1, 0.5, 0.5})
    
    -- 刷新战场（清除场上的绿色选择按钮）
    monitorCombatZones()
    -- 刷新法术区（重置按钮文字）
    monitorSpellZones()
end

-- [法术区监控]：检测法术卡进入/离开/发动
function monitorSpellZones()
    for color, cfg in pairs(SPELL_CONFIG) do
        local zone = getObjectFromGUID(cfg.zone)
        if zone then
            local spellObj, spellID = nil, nil
            
            -- 1. 扫描当前区域内的法术卡
            for _, obj in ipairs(zone.getObjects()) do
                if obj.tag == "Card" then
                    local sid = obj.getVar("SPELL_ID")
                    if sid then spellObj = obj; spellID = sid; break end
                end
            end
            
            -- 获取该区域上一次记录的状态
            local state = spell_zone_states[cfg.zone] or { spell_guid = nil }
            
            -- 2. 检测卡牌是否离开 / 变动
            if state.spell_guid and (not spellObj or spellObj.getGUID() ~= state.spell_guid) then
                local oldCard = getObjectFromGUID(state.spell_guid)
                if oldCard then oldCard.clearButtons() end
                
                -- 如果离开的卡正在施法，立即取消！
                if spell_casting_state.active and spell_casting_state.spell_guid == state.spell_guid then
                    cancelSpellCast()
                end
            end
            
            -- 3. 刷新法术区UI (显示“已准备”)
            updateSpellZoneUI(zone, spellID, cfg.player)
            
            -- 4. 更新卡牌按钮
            if spellObj and SPELL_DB[spellID] then
                updateSpellCardUI(spellObj, spellID) 
                spell_zone_states[cfg.zone] = { spell_guid = spellObj.getGUID() }
            else
                if spellObj then spellObj.clearButtons() end
                spell_zone_states[cfg.zone] = { spell_guid = nil }
            end
        end
    end
end

-- [更新法术卡按钮]：显示“发动效果”或“取消施法”
function updateSpellCardUI(card, id)
    local data = SPELL_DB[id]
    local btnLabel = "🔮 发动效果"
    local btnColor = {0.6, 0.2, 0.8}
    
    -- 状态检测：如果是正在施法的卡，按钮变为取消
    if spell_casting_state.active and spell_casting_state.spell_guid == card.getGUID() then
        btnLabel = "❌ 取消施法"
        btnColor = {1, 0.2, 0.2}
    end

    local existingButtons = card.getButtons()

    if not existingButtons then 
        card.createButton({
            label=btnLabel, 
            click_function="click_cast_spell_start", function_owner=self,
            position={0, 0.5, 0}, width=800, height=400, font_size=100, color=btnColor, font_color={1,1,1}
        })
    else
        local currentLabel = existingButtons[1].label
        
        -- 特殊菜单保护：如果正在显示多选项菜单(如七大圣盟约)，不强制覆盖
        if spell_casting_state.active and currentLabel ~= "🔮 发动效果" and currentLabel ~= "❌ 取消施法" then
            return 
        end
        
        -- 状态同步：如果并未施法，但按钮仍显示取消，强制重置
        if not spell_casting_state.active and currentLabel ~= btnLabel then
             card.clearButtons()
             card.createButton({
                label=btnLabel, 
                click_function="click_cast_spell_start", function_owner=self,
                position={0, 0.5, 0}, width=800, height=400, font_size=100, color=btnColor, font_color={1,1,1}
            })
            return
        end

        -- 常规更新文字
        if currentLabel ~= btnLabel then
            card.editButton({index=0, label=btnLabel, color=btnColor})
        end
    end
end

-- [点击事件]：发动法术
function click_cast_spell_start(obj, color)
    -- 如果点击的是正在施法的卡，则视为取消
    if spell_casting_state.active and spell_casting_state.spell_guid == obj.getGUID() then
        cancelSpellCast()
        return
    end

    if spell_casting_state.active then cancelSpellCast() end

    local id = obj.getVar("SPELL_ID")
    local data = SPELL_DB[id]
    
    spell_casting_state = { active=true, caster=color, spell_guid=obj.getGUID(), spell_id=id }
    broadcastToAll("🪄 "..color.." 正在准备发动 ["..data.name.."]...", {0.7, 0.4, 1})
    
    -- 立即刷新按钮状态
    updateSpellCardUI(obj, id)

    if data.target_type == "none" then
        executeSpellEffect(nil)
    else
        broadcastToAll("🎯 请点击场上的单位作为目标！(或再次点击法术卡取消)", {1,1,0})
        monitorCombatZones() -- 刷新战场显示选择按钮
    end
end

-- [点击事件]：选择目标
function click_target_for_spell(obj) 
    resolveSpellTarget(obj.getGUID()) 
end

-- [目标结算]：验证目标合法性
function resolveSpellTarget(targetZoneGUID)
    if not spell_casting_state.active then return end
    local spellData = SPELL_DB[spell_casting_state.spell_id]
    local targetCfg = zone_map[targetZoneGUID]
    local targetState = combat_states[targetZoneGUID]
    
    local targetCard = nil
    if targetState and targetState.card_guid then targetCard = getObjectFromGUID(targetState.card_guid) end
    if not targetCard then broadcastToAll("❌ 无效目标", {1,0,0}) return end
    
    -- 法术免疫检测 (如乾坤圈护体)
    if targetState.flags and targetState.flags.spell_immune then
        broadcastToAll("🛡️ 目标具有法术免疫！", {0,1,1})
        return
    end
    
    -- 目标类型检测
    if spellData.target_type == "self_unit" then
        if targetCfg.player ~= spell_casting_state.caster then broadcastToAll("❌ 必须选择己方单位", {1,0,0}) return end
        if spellData.req_name and not string.find(targetCard.getName(), spellData.req_name) then
            broadcastToAll("❌ 目标必须是 ["..spellData.req_name.."]", {1,0,0}) return
        end
    elseif spellData.target_type == "enemy_unit" then
        if targetCfg.player == spell_casting_state.caster then broadcastToAll("❌ 必须选择敌方单位", {1,0,0}) return end
    end
    
    executeSpellEffect(targetZoneGUID)
end

-- [执行法术]
function executeSpellEffect(targetZoneGUID)
    local id = spell_casting_state.spell_id
    local caster = spell_casting_state.caster
    
    -- 1. 调用具体的法术函数
    local funcName = SPELL_DB[id].func
    if _G[funcName] then _G[funcName](caster, targetZoneGUID) end
    
    -- 2. 检查是否手动清理 (如七大圣盟约需要玩家选分支)
    if SPELL_DB[id].manual_cleanup then 
        return 
    end
    
    -- 3. 自动收卡
    completeSpellExecution(caster, spell_casting_state.spell_guid)
end

-- [法术完成]：送去法术墓地
function completeSpellExecution(caster, cardGUID)
    local spellCard = getObjectFromGUID(cardGUID)
    
    if spellCard then
        local destGUID = SPELL_GRAVE_CONFIG[caster]
        local destObj = getObjectFromGUID(destGUID)
        
        if destObj then
            local rotY = 180
            if caster == "Green" then rotY = 0 end
            
            if destObj.tag == "Bag" or destObj.tag == "Deck" then
                destObj.putObject(spellCard)
            else
                local p = destObj.getPosition()
                spellCard.setPositionSmooth({p.x, p.y + 2, p.z})
                spellCard.setRotationSmooth({0, rotY, 0}) 
            end
        else
            broadcastToAll("⚠️ 未配置法术去向，卡牌保留原地。", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
        end
    end
    
    -- 重置状态
    spell_casting_state = { active = false }
    monitorCombatZones()
end

function updateEquipZoneUI(zoneObj, equipID, playerColor)
    if not zoneObj then return end
    local labelText = "【装备槽】\n(空)"; local textColor = {0.5, 0.5, 0.5} 
    if equipID and EQUIP_DB[equipID] then labelText = "【已装备】\n" .. EQUIP_DB[equipID].name; textColor = {0.2, 1, 0.2} end
    local rot = {0, 180, 0}; if playerColor == "Green" then rot = {0, 0, 0} end
    local btnParams = {label=labelText, click_function="none", function_owner=self, position={0, -0.4, -0.8}, width=0, height=0, font_size=120, font_color=textColor, font_style="Bold", rotation=rot}
    if not zoneObj.getButtons() then zoneObj.createButton(btnParams) else zoneObj.editButton({index=0, label=labelText, font_color=textColor, rotation=rot}) end
end

function updateEquipmentCardUI(equipObj, equipID, bearerGUID)
    if not equipObj then return end
    local data = EQUIP_DB[equipID]
    if not data or not data.skills then return end 
    if equipObj.getButtons() and #equipObj.getButtons() ~= #data.skills then equipObj.clearButtons() end

    if not equipObj.getButtons() then
        for i, skill in ipairs(data.skills) do
            local funcName = "GEQ_" .. equipID .. "_" .. i
            self.setVar(funcName, function(obj, color)
                local cdKey = obj.getGUID() .. "_" .. i
                if active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] then broadcastToAll("⏳ ["..skill.label.."] 冷却中", {1,0.2,0.2}) return end
                if skill.limit ~= "trigger" then active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = true end
                _G[skill.func](obj, color, bearerGUID, obj.getGUID(), i)
            end)
            local zPos = 0.8 - (i-1) * 0.6 
            local btnColor = {0, 0.8, 1}; if skill.label:find("降妖") then btnColor = {1, 0.2, 0.2} end 
            equipObj.createButton({label=skill.label, click_function=funcName, function_owner=self, position={0, 0.5, zPos}, width=800, height=250, font_size=120, color=btnColor, font_color={1,1,1}})
        end
    end
end
function updateUnitCardUI(cardObj, unitID, bearerGUID)
    if not cardObj then return end
    local data = UNIT_DB[unitID]
    if not data or not data.skills then return end
    
    local existingButtons = cardObj.getButtons()
    local needRedraw = false

    -- 1. 检查按钮数量是否匹配
    if not existingButtons or #existingButtons ~= #data.skills then
        needRedraw = true
    else
        -- 2. 检查第一个按钮是不是我们的技能按钮
        if existingButtons[1].label ~= data.skills[1].label then
            needRedraw = true
        end
        
        -- 3. 检查点击函数是否归 Global 所有
        if existingButtons[1].function_owner ~= self then
             needRedraw = true
        end
    end

    if needRedraw then
        -- 强制清除旧按钮（无论是自带的还是错误的）
        cardObj.clearButtons()
        
        -- 【修复关键点】双重保险：每次重绘时确保卡牌自带UI被关闭
        safeCall(cardObj, "toggleUI", {show=false})
        
        for i, skill in ipairs(data.skills) do
            -- 动态生成技能函数名
            local funcName = skill.func or ("skill_generic_"..unitID.."_"..i)
            
            -- 如果该函数在全局未定义，则创建一个通用的“显示描述”函数
            if not _G[funcName] then
                self.setVar(funcName, function(obj, color)
                    local cdKey = obj.getGUID() .. "_u_skill_" .. i
                    
                    if skill.limit ~= "trigger" and active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] then 
                        broadcastToAll("⏳ ["..skill.label.."] 本回合/本场已使用", {1,0.2,0.2}) 
                        return 
                    end
                    
                    if skill.limit ~= "trigger" then active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = true end
                    
                    broadcastToAll("🌟 ["..data.name.."] 发动 ["..skill.label.."]:", {1,1,0})
                    broadcastToAll(skill.desc, {0.8,0.8,0.8})
                end)
            end
            
            -- 按钮排版
            local zPos = -1.2 + (i-1) * 0.4 
            local btnColor = {0.2, 0.2, 0.2} 
            if skill.limit == "duel" then btnColor = {0.5, 0, 0.5} end 
            
            cardObj.createButton({
                label=skill.label, 
                click_function=funcName, 
                function_owner=self, 
                position={0.8, 0.5, zPos}, 
                width=600, height=200, 
                font_size=80, 
                color=btnColor, 
                font_color={1,1,1}
            })
        end
    end
end



function updateZoneDisplay(zone, config, state)
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
    if not card then return end
    
    -- 1. 法术选择模式
    if spell_casting_state.active then
        createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label="🎯 选择", click_function="click_target_for_spell", color={0.5,1,0.5}, font_color={0,0,0}})
        return
    end

    -- 2. 火尖枪选人模式 (吸取)
    if skill_target_state.active then
        if state.card_guid ~= skill_target_state.bearer_guid then
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label="🎯 吸取", click_function="click_skill_target", color={1,0.5,0}, font_color={1,1,1}})
        else
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label="[ 本尊 ]", click_function="none", color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, font_color={1,1,1}})
        end
        return
    end

    -- 3. ⭐【新增】乾坤圈选人模式 (降攻)
    if qiankun_target_state.active then
        -- 只能选敌方单位
        if config.player ~= qiankun_target_state.caster then
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {
                label="📉 降攻", 
                click_function="click_qiankun_target", -- 对应下面新增的函数
                color={1, 0.2, 0.2}, 
                font_color={1,1,1}
            })
        else
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label="[ 我方 ]", click_function="none", color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, font_color={1,1,1}})
        end
        return
    end
-- 3.5. 通用神魔技能选人模式
    -- 【修复】这里加了 unit_skill_target_state and ... 防止变量未定义导致报错
    if unit_skill_target_state and unit_skill_target_state.active then
        createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {
            label="🎯 选择", 
            click_function="click_unit_skill_target", -- 对应 PART 9.5 新加的函数
            color={1, 0, 1}, 
            font_color={1,1,1}
        })
        return
    end

    -- 4. 常规显示
    if not state.is_summoned then
        local req = card.call("getSummonRequirements")
        if req then showSummonUI(zone, req) return end
    end

    if current_attacker then
        if current_attacker.zone_guid == config.zone then
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label="❌ 取消", click_function="click_cancel_attack", color={1,0.2,0.2,1}, font_color={1,1,1,1}})
        elseif isValidTarget(config) then
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label="🎯 目标", click_function="click_target", color={1,0,0,1}, font_color={1,1,1,1}})
        end
        return
    end

    local str = formatK(state.atk) .. " | " .. formatK(state.hp)
    local isMyTurn = (not Turns.enable) or (Turns.turn_color == config.player)
    local canAttackRow = (config.row == 1) or (not hasFrontRowUnits(config.player))
    if state.flags and state.flags.allow_back_row_attack then canAttackRow = true end 

    if isMyTurn and canAttackRow then
        if attack_locks[state.card_guid] then
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label=str.."\n[ 🔒 锁定 ]", click_function="none", color={0.5,0,0.5,1}, font_color={1,1,1,1}})
        elseif attacks_this_turn[state.card_guid] and not state.flags.multi_attack then
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label=str.."\n[ 💤 ]", click_function="none", color={0.8,0.8,0.8,1}, font_color={0.3,0.3,0.3,1}})
        else
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label=str.."\n[⚔️]", click_function="click_declare_attack", color={1,1,1,1}, font_color={0,0,0,1}})
        end
    else
        createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label=str, click_function="none", color={1,1,1,1}, font_color={0,0,0,1}})
    end
    if moon_target_state.active then
        -- 排除自己
        if state.card_guid ~= moon_target_state.bearer_guid then
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {
                label="🏹 吸取", 
                click_function="click_moon_target", -- 对应下面新增的函数
                color={0.2, 0.2, 1}, 
                font_color={1,1,1}
            })
        else
            createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label="[ 本尊 ]", click_function="none", color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, font_color={1,1,1}})
        end
        return
    end
end

-- ########################################################
--  PART 9: 技能与法术效果实现

function API_UpdateBuff(params)
    if not params.guid then return end
    local b = buff_registry[params.guid] or {atk_add=0, atk_mult=1, hp_mult=1, flags={}}
    if params.atk then b.atk_add = b.atk_add + params.atk end
    if params.atk_mult then b.atk_mult = b.atk_mult * params.atk_mult end
    if params.hp_mult then b.hp_mult = b.hp_mult * params.hp_mult end 
    if params.flags then
        for k,v in pairs(params.flags) do b.flags[k] = v end
    end
    buff_registry[params.guid] = b
end

function checkHeroRestriction(bearerGUID, equipGUID, skillIndex)
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(bearerGUID); local equipObj = getObjectFromGUID(equipGUID)
    if not card or not equipObj then return false end
    local id = equipObj.getVar("EQUIP_ID"); local d = EQUIP_DB[id]
    if d.hero and d.hero ~= "无" and not string.find(card.getName(), d.hero) then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 只有 ["..d.hero.."] 才能使用！", {1,0,0})
        local cdKey = equipGUID .. "_" .. skillIndex
        active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = nil
        return false
    end
    return true
end

-- ================= 装备技能 =================

function skill_ult_atk(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx)
    if not checkHeroRestriction(bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx) then return end
    local bearerState = nil; local bearerZone = nil
    for z, s in pairs(combat_states) do
        if s.card_guid == bearerGUID then bearerState = s; bearerZone = z break end
    end
    if not bearerState then return end
    local p = zone_map[bearerZone].player
    local total_absorb = 0
    for z, s in pairs(combat_states) do
        if zone_map[z].player == p and s.card_guid ~= bearerGUID and s.active then
            total_absorb = total_absorb + s.atk
        end
    end
    API_UpdateBuff({guid=bearerGUID, atk=total_absorb})
    broadcastToAll("🌟 必杀！吸收全队力量: +" .. formatK(total_absorb), {1,0.8,0})
end

function skill_hammer_dice(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx)
    -- 这是一个通用效果，无需检测英雄名字
    local r = math.random(1,6)
    local boost = r * 300000
    
    -- 加成持续到回合结束 (buff_registry 会在回合开始自动重置)
    API_UpdateBuff({guid=bearerGUID, atk=boost})
    
    broadcastToAll("🎲 [雷神之锤] 雷击判定：掷出 ["..r.."]！\n⚡ 攻击力激增 +"..formatK(boost).." (持续至回合结束)", {0,1,1})
end

-- 【修改】火尖枪-效果1：开启选人模式
function skill_absorb_power(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx)
    if not checkHeroRestriction(bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx) then return end
    
    -- 激活状态，记录是谁发动的
    skill_target_state = { active=true, caster=color, bearer_guid=bearerGUID }
    
    broadcastToAll("🔥 火尖枪 [借力] 发动！\n请点击场上任意一名【其他角色】以吸取其攻击力！", {1,0.5,0})
    monitorCombatZones() -- 立即刷新UI显示按钮
end

-- 【新增】处理点击吸取按钮
function click_skill_target(obj) 
    resolveSkillTarget(obj.getGUID()) 
end

-- 【新增】执行吸取逻辑
function resolveSkillTarget(targetZoneGUID)
    if not skill_target_state.active then return end
    
    local targetState = combat_states[targetZoneGUID]
    -- 校验目标是否有效
    if not targetState or not targetState.card_guid then 
        broadcastToAll("❌ 目标无效", {1,0,0})
        return 
    end
    
    -- 获取目标当前攻击力
    local absorbAtk = targetState.atk or 0
    local targetCard = getObjectFromGUID(targetState.card_guid)
    
    if absorbAtk > 0 then
        -- 加给持有者 (回合结束会自动清除，因为 buff_registry 在 onPlayerTurnStart 会重置)
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=skill_target_state.bearer_guid, atk=absorbAtk})
        
        broadcastToAll("🔥 借力成功！\n从 ["..(targetCard and targetCard.getName() or "目标").."] 处获得了 "..formatK(absorbAtk).." 点攻击力！", {1,0.5,0})
    else
        broadcastToAll("⚠️ 目标没有攻击力可供吸取。", {1,1,0})
    end
    
    -- 关闭选人模式
    skill_target_state = { active=false }
    monitorCombatZones()
end

-- ================= 乾坤圈 核心逻辑 =================

-- ================= 乾坤圈 核心逻辑 (修复版) =================

-- 效果1: 乾坤一击 (智能判定 AOE 或 单体)
-- ================= 乾坤圈 (最终修复版) =================

-- 效果1: 乾坤一击 (非哪吒单体 / 哪吒AOE)
function skill_qiankun_hit(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx)
    -- 注意：这里不需要 checkHeroRestriction，因为我们允许所有人触发，然后在下面分流
    
    local bearerCard = getObjectFromGUID(bearerGUID)
    local bearerName = bearerCard.getName()
    
    -- 智能判断：是哪吒吗？
    if string.find(bearerName, "哪吒") then
        -- === 分支A：哪吒使用 (全屏AOE) ===
        broadcastToAll("⭕ 乾坤圈 (哪吒神力)：震慑全场，敌方全体降攻！", {1,0.5,0})
        local targetP = (color == "White") and "Green" or "White"
        local hitCount = 0
        
        for guid, cfg in pairs(zone_map) do
            if cfg.player == targetP then
                local s = combat_states[guid]
                if s and s.active then
                    applyQiankunDebuff(guid)
                    hitCount = hitCount + 1
                end
            end
        end
        
        if hitCount == 0 then
            broadcastToAll("💨 敌方场上无人，乾坤圈扑了个空。", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
        end
    else
        -- === 分支B：其他人使用 (单体选人) ===
        qiankun_target_state = { active=true, caster=color, bearer_guid=bearerGUID }
        broadcastToAll("⭕ 乾坤圈 (借用)：请手动点击 1 名【敌方角色】进行压制。", {1,1,0})
        monitorCombatZones() -- 刷新UI出按钮
    end
end

-- 效果2: 法术免疫 (必须是哪吒)
function skill_spell_immune(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx)
    -- 这里必须手动检查，因为数据库已经放开了
    local bearerCard = getObjectFromGUID(bearerGUID)
    
    if not string.find(bearerCard.getName(), "哪吒") then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 只有 [哪吒] 本尊才能激发乾坤圈的护主神力！", {1,0,0})
        -- 既然没发动成功，就返还冷却
        local cdKey = equipGUID .. "_" .. idx
        active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = nil
        return
    end
    
    API_UpdateBuff({guid=bearerGUID, flags={spell_immune=true}})
    broadcastToAll("🛡️ [乾坤圈] 护主！本回合内，哪吒免疫一切法术效果！", {0,1,1})
end

-- 效果2: 法术无效化 (仅限哪吒)
function skill_spell_immune(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx)
    if not checkHeroRestriction(bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx) then return end
    
    local bearerCard = getObjectFromGUID(bearerGUID)
    if not string.find(bearerCard.getName(), "哪吒") then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 只有 [哪吒] 才能激发乾坤圈的护主神力！", {1,0,0})
        -- 恢复冷却
        local cdKey = equipGUID .. "_" .. idx
        active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = nil
        return
    end
    
    -- 赋予法术免疫标签 (持续到回合结束)
    API_UpdateBuff({guid=bearerGUID, flags={spell_immune=true}})
    broadcastToAll("🛡️ [乾坤圈] 护主！本回合内，哪吒免疫一切法术效果！", {0,1,1})
end

-- 【辅助】执行降攻逻辑 (扣除 30% 基础攻击)
function applyQiankunDebuff(targetZoneGUID)
    local s = combat_states[targetZoneGUID]
    if not s or not s.card_guid then return end
    
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(s.card_guid)
    if not card then return end
    
    local base_atk = card.getVar("DEFAULT_ATK") or 0
    if base_atk == 0 then local a,_ = card.call("getBaseStats"); base_atk = a or 0 end
    
    local current_debuff = card.getVar("temp_debuff") or 0
    local penalty = math.floor(base_atk * 0.3) -- 扣 30%

    broadcastToAll("📉 乾坤压制！" .. card.getName() .. " 力量降低 " .. formatK(penalty), {1,0.2,0.2})
end

function skill_mirror_reveal(obj, color)
    local targetP = (color == "White") and "Green" or "White"
    local count = 0
    
    broadcastToAll("👁️ 照妖镜发动！正在扫描...", {1,1,0})
    
    for guid, cfg in pairs(zone_map) do
        if cfg.player == targetP then
            local zone = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if zone then 
                for _, card in ipairs(zone.getObjects()) do 
                    if card.tag == "Card" and card.getVar("DEFAULT_ATK") then
                        -- 修复：只检测背面的卡
                        if card.is_face_down then 
                            card.flip()
                            broadcastToAll("✨ 显形: " .. card.getName(), {0.5,1,1})
                            
                            local race = card.call("getRace") or ""
                            if string.find(race, "魔") then
                                local cGuid = card.getGUID()
                                attack_locks[cGuid] = 2
                                card.highlightOn({1,0,1}, 2) 
                                broadcastToAll("🔒 [照妖镜] 锁定: " .. card.getName(), {1,0,1})
                                count = count + 1
                            end
                        end
                    end 
                end 
            end
        end
    end
    
    if count == 0 then broadcastToAll("💨 没有发现隐藏的魔族。", {0.5,0.5,0.5}) else monitorCombatZones() end
end

function skill_mirror_kill(obj, color)
    local targetP = (color == "White") and "Green" or "White"
    local count = 0
    broadcastToAll("🪞 照妖镜：正在炼化敌方魔族...", {1,0.5,0})

    for guid, cfg in pairs(zone_map) do
        if cfg.player == targetP then
            local zone = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if zone then 
                for _, card in ipairs(zone.getObjects()) do 
                    if card.tag == "Card" and card.getVar("DEFAULT_ATK") then
                        local race = card.call("getRace") or ""
                        if string.find(race, "魔") then
                            local base_atk = card.getVar("DEFAULT_ATK") or 0
                            local current_debuff = card.getVar("temp_debuff") or 0
                            local penalty = math.floor(base_atk * 0.3)
                            local new_debuff = current_debuff + penalty
                            card.setVar("temp_debuff", new_debuff)
                            
                            broadcastToAll("💥 [魔] " .. card.getName() .. " 妖力流失 -" .. formatK(penalty) .. " (剩 " .. formatK(base_atk - new_debuff) .. ")", {1,0.5,0})
                            
                            if (base_atk - new_debuff) <= 300000 then
                                broadcastToAll("💀 妖气散尽！" .. card.getName() .. " 被炼化！", {1,0,0})
                                handleZoneDeath(guid, {card_guid=card.getGUID()}, cfg.grave)
                            end
                            count = count + 1
                        end
                    end 
                end 
            end
        end
    end
    if count == 0 then broadcastToAll("💨 敌方场上没有魔族。", {0.5,0.5,0.5}) else monitorCombatZones() end
end

-- 修改：风火轮 (效果1) - 移动累加攻 (限2次)
function skill_move_buff(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx) 
    -- 1. 确保数据表存在
    if not buff_registry[bearerGUID] then
        buff_registry[bearerGUID] = {atk_add=0, atk_mult=1, hp_mult=1, flags={}, move_stacks=0}
    end
    
    local buff = buff_registry[bearerGUID]
    -- 初始化层数
    buff.move_stacks = buff.move_stacks or 0
    
    -- 2. 检查层数上限
    if buff.move_stacks >= 2 then
        broadcastToAll("🚫 [风火轮] 速度已达极限！无法继续叠加。", {1,0,0})
        return
    end
    
    -- 3. 执行加成 (每次 x1.2)
    -- 注意：这里是乘法叠加，叠满2次约等于 1.44倍
    API_UpdateBuff({guid=bearerGUID, atk_mult=1.2})
    
    -- 4. 增加计数
    buff.move_stacks = buff.move_stacks + 1
    
    broadcastToAll("💨 [风火轮] 模拟移动！攻击力 +20% (当前: " .. buff.move_stacks .. "/2 层)", {0,1,0})
end

function skill_hammer_absorb(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx)
    -- 1. 严格检查是否为 "雷神"
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(bearerGUID)
    if not string.find(card.getName(), "雷神") then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 只有 [雷神] 才能承受全队的雷霆之力！", {1,0,0})
        -- 返还冷却
        local cdKey = equipGUID .. "_" .. idx
        active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = nil
        return
    end
    
    -- 2. 计算队友攻击力总和
    local total_absorb = 0
    local myPlayer = (color == "White") and "White" or "Green"
    
    for zoneGUID, state in pairs(combat_states) do
        -- 必须是己方格子 + 必须有卡 + 不能是自己
        if zone_map[zoneGUID].player == myPlayer and state.active and state.card_guid ~= bearerGUID then
            total_absorb = total_absorb + state.atk
        end
    end
    
    if total_absorb > 0 then
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=bearerGUID, atk=total_absorb})
        broadcastToAll("⚡ [雷神] 奥义发动！\n集结了全队之力，攻击力大幅提升 +"..formatK(total_absorb).."！", {1,0.8,0})
    else
        broadcastToAll("💨 场上没有其他队友可以借力...", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
    end
end
-- ================= 乾坤圈 核心逻辑 =================

-- 效果1: 乾坤一击 (智能判定 AOE 或 单体)
function skill_qiankun_hit(obj, color, bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx)
    if not checkHeroRestriction(bearerGUID, equipGUID, idx) then return end
    
    local bearerCard = getObjectFromGUID(bearerGUID)
    local bearerName = bearerCard.getName()
    
    -- 判定是否为“哪吒”
    if string.find(bearerName, "哪吒") then
        -- === 哪吒：全屏 AOE 降攻 ===
        broadcastToAll("⭕ 乾坤圈 (哪吒专属)：以此为中心，震慑敌方全场！", {1,0.5,0})
        local targetP = (color == "White") and "Green" or "White"
        local hitCount = 0
        
        for guid, cfg in pairs(zone_map) do
            if cfg.player == targetP then
                local s = combat_states[guid]
                if s and s.active then
                    applyQiankunDebuff(guid)
                    hitCount = hitCount + 1
                end
            end
        end
        
        if hitCount == 0 then
            broadcastToAll("💨 敌方场上空无一人，乾坤圈扑了个空。", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
        end
    else
        -- === 非哪吒：开启单体选人模式 ===
        qiankun_target_state = { active=true, caster=color, bearer_guid=bearerGUID }
        broadcastToAll("⭕ 乾坤圈：请点击选择 1 名【敌方角色】进行压制。", {1,1,0})
        monitorCombatZones() -- 刷新UI显示按钮
    end
end

        -- 恢复冷却

end

-- 【辅助】执行降攻逻辑 (扣除 30% 基础攻击)
function applyQiankunDebuff(targetZoneGUID)
    local s = combat_states[targetZoneGUID]
    if not s or not s.card_guid then return end
    
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(s.card_guid)
    if not card then return end
    
    local base_atk = card.getVar("DEFAULT_ATK") or 0
    if base_atk == 0 then local a,_ = card.call("getBaseStats"); base_atk = a or 0 end
    
    local current_debuff = card.getVar("temp_debuff") or 0
    local penalty = math.floor(base_atk * 0.3) -- 扣 30%
    
    -- 累加 Debuff
    card.setVar("temp_debuff", current_debuff + penalty)
    
    broadcastToAll("📉 乾坤压制！" .. card.getName() .. " 力量降低 " .. formatK(penalty), {1,0.2,0.2})
end

-- 【新增】乾坤圈点击目标处理
function click_qiankun_target(obj)
    if not qiankun_target_state.active then return end
    applyQiankunDebuff(obj.getGUID())
    
    -- 关闭选人模式
    qiankun_target_state = { active=false }
    monitorCombatZones()
end

function resolveMoonTarget(targetZoneGUID)
    if not moon_target_state.active then return end
    
    local targetState = combat_states[targetZoneGUID]
    if targetState and targetState.atk > 0 then
        -- 增加攻击力 (持续到回合结束)
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=moon_target_state.bearer_guid, atk=targetState.atk})
        broadcastToAll("🏹 月光汇聚！攻击力增加 +"..formatK(targetState.atk), {0.5,0.8,1})
    else
        broadcastToAll("⚠️ 目标没有力量可供吸取。", {1,1,0})
    end
    
    moon_target_state = { active=false }
    monitorCombatZones()
end

function spell_fs1_giant(c,t) local r=math.random(1,6); broadcastToAll("🎲 掷出 "..r, {1,1,1}); if r==1 or r==3 or r==6 then API_UpdateBuff({guid=combat_states[t].card_guid, atk_mult=100}) else damage_registry[combat_states[t].card_guid] = (damage_registry[combat_states[t].card_guid] or 0) + (combat_states[t].hp * 0.5); broadcastToAll("💔 扣血50%", {0.5,0.5,0.5}) end end
-- 修改：分身术 (手牌变分身 + 50%数值 + 盖放)
-- 修改：分身术 (弃手牌 -> 生成专用 Token)
-- 修改：分身术 (修复悬浮和无法移动的问题)
-- 修改：分身术 (弃手牌提示 + 生成专用 Token)
function spell_fs2_clones(caster, targetZoneGUID)
    -- 1. 检查场上神魔数量 (必须仅有1张)
    local myUnits = {}
    for guid, cfg in pairs(zone_map) do
        if cfg.player == caster then
            local state = combat_states[guid]
            if state and state.active and state.is_summoned then
                table.insert(myUnits, state)
            end
        end
    end
    
    if #myUnits ~= 1 then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 条件不符：人界必须【仅有 1 张】神魔卡才能发动分身术！", {1,0,0})
        return
    end
    
    -- 2. 检查分身来源袋子
    local sourceBag = getObjectFromGUID(CLONE_SOURCE_GUID)
    if not sourceBag then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 错误：找不到分身卡来源袋子，请检查脚本配置 CLONE_SOURCE_GUID！", {1,0,0})
        return
    end

    local originalState = myUnits[1]
    local originalCard = getObjectFromGUID(originalState.card_guid)
    
    -- 计算分身数值
    local cloneATK = math.floor(originalState.atk * 0.5)
    local cloneHP = math.floor(originalState.hp * 0.5)
    
    -- 3. 统计手牌
    local handObjs = Player[caster].getHandObjects()
    local cardsToDiscard = {} -- 先存起来，不要在遍历时直接操作物理移动
    
    for _, card in ipairs(handObjs) do
        if card.tag == "Card" then
            table.insert(cardsToDiscard, card)
        end
    end
    
    local cardCount = #cardsToDiscard
    
    if cardCount == 0 then
        broadcastToAll("💨 手牌为空，无法制造分身。", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
        return
    end
    
    -- ⭐【新增提示】明确告知手牌被弃掉了
    broadcastToAll("🃏 [分身术] 生效！检测到 " .. cardCount .. " 张手牌，因为分身牌已经代替你的手牌上场了 所以请把手牌至于别处", {1, 0.5, 0})
    broadcastToAll("👥 正在生成 " .. cardCount .. " 个幻影分身 (ATK:"..formatK(cloneATK).." | HP:"..formatK(cloneHP)..")", {0,1,1})

    -- 4. 执行弃牌
    local hellGUID = HELL_CONFIG[caster]
    local hellObj = getObjectFromGUID(hellGUID)
    
    for _, card in ipairs(cardsToDiscard) do
        if hellObj then
            if hellObj.tag == "Bag" or hellObj.tag == "Deck" then
                hellObj.putObject(card)
            else
                card.setPositionSmooth(hellObj.getPosition())
            end
        else
            card.destruct()
        end
    end

    -- 5. 寻找空位并生成分身
    local emptyZones = {}
    for _, cfg in ipairs(COMBAT_CONFIG) do
        if cfg.player == caster and not combat_states[cfg.zone].active then
            table.insert(emptyZones, cfg.zone)
        end
    end
    
    for i = 1, cardCount do
        if i <= #emptyZones then
            local zoneGUID = emptyZones[i]
            local zoneObj = getObjectFromGUID(zoneGUID)
            
            if zoneObj then
                local p = zoneObj.getPosition()
                
                -- 从袋子生成分身卡
                sourceBag.takeObject({
                    position = {p.x, p.y + 1.5, p.z},
                    rotation = {0, (caster=="White" and 180 or 0), 0},
                    callback_function = function(spawnedCard)
                        -- 锁住防飞，0.5秒后解锁
                        spawnedCard.setLock(true) 
                        Wait.time(function() spawnedCard.setLock(false) end, 0.5)
                        
                        -- 注册数据
                        active_clones[spawnedCard.getGUID()] = {
                            atk = cloneATK,
                            hp = cloneHP,
                            owner = caster
                        }
                    end
                })
            end
        else
            broadcastToAll("⚠️ 场上空位不足，第 " .. i .. " 个分身无法生成。", {1,0.5,0})
            break
        end
    end
    
    -- 延迟刷新UI
    Wait.time(function() monitorCombatZones() end, 1.5)
end
-- 修改：火眼金睛 (看手牌 + 猴生肖标记)
function spell_fs3_peep_hand(caster, targetZoneGUID)
    local state = combat_states[targetZoneGUID]
    if not state or not state.card_guid then return end
    
    local targetCard = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
    if not targetCard then return end
    
    -- === 效果1: 查看对方手牌 (私聊打印) ===
    local enemyColor = (caster == "White") and "Green" or "White"
    local enemyHand = Player[enemyColor].getHandObjects()
    
    local msg = "\n🔥 [火眼金睛] 已发动！看破 [" .. enemyColor .. "] 方手牌：\n"
    msg = msg .. "--------------------------------\n"
    
    if #enemyHand == 0 then
        msg = msg .. "( 对方手牌为空 )"
    else
        for _, card in ipairs(enemyHand) do
            local name = card.getName()
            if name == "" then name = "未知卡牌" end
            msg = msg .. "🎴 " .. name .. "\n"
        end
    end
    msg = msg .. "--------------------------------"
    
    -- 发送私有信息给施法者 (printToColor)
    broadcastToColor(msg, caster, {1, 0.8, 0})
    broadcastToAll("👁️ " .. caster .. " 使用了火眼金睛，正在窥视对方手牌！", {1,1,1})
    
    -- === 效果2: 检查猴生肖 ===
    -- 检查 TAGS 变量 或 Description
    local tags = targetCard.getVar("TAGS") or ""
    local desc = targetCard.getDescription() or ""
    
    -- 只要包含 "猴" 字就算 (涵盖 "猴生肖", "孙悟空(猴)", "六耳猕猴" 等)
    if string.find(tags, "猴") or string.find(desc, "猴") or string.find(targetCard.getName(), "猴") then
        monkey_eye_pending[caster] = true
        broadcastToAll("🐒 [猴生肖] 响应了呼唤！\n下个回合开始时，此卡可从地狱回收。", {0, 1, 0})
    end
end

-- 修改：斗战胜佛之怒 (全场/全手牌回卡组 + 计数回收)
-- 修改：斗战胜佛之怒 (带详细调试 + 自动洗牌)
function spell_fs16_wukong_wrath(caster, targetZoneGUID)
    broadcastToAll("🔧 [系统自检] 开始执行斗战胜佛之怒...", {0.5, 0.5, 0.5})

    -- 1. 确认敌方阵营
    local enemyColor = (caster == "White") and "Green" or "White"
    
    -- 2. 检查配置表
    local deckGUID = DECK_CONFIG[enemyColor]
    if deckGUID == nil or deckGUID == "这里填白方卡组GUID" or deckGUID == "" then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 错误 01: 代码中的 DECK_CONFIG 没填！\n请在脚本 PART 1.5 填入 ["..enemyColor.."] 方的卡组 GUID。", {1,0,0})
        return
    end
    
    -- 3. 寻找物理模型
    local deckObj = getObjectFromGUID(deckGUID)
    if deckObj == nil then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 错误 02: 找不到 GUID 为 ["..deckGUID.."] 的物体！\n卡组可能被删除了，或者放进袋子里了，或者 GUID 填错了。", {1,0,0})
        return
    end
    
    -- 4. 获取目标坐标
    local targetPos = deckObj.getPosition()
    broadcastToAll("✅ 检测通过：目标卡组在 " .. string.format("(%.1f, %.1f, %.1f)", targetPos.x, targetPos.y, targetPos.z), {0,1,0})
    broadcastToAll("🌪️ [斗战胜佛之怒] 爆发！全场回退！", {1, 0.8, 0})

    local count = 0

    -- === 执行：场上回退 ===
    for zoneGUID, cfg in pairs(zone_map) do
        if cfg.player == enemyColor then
            local state = combat_states[zoneGUID]
            if state and state.active and state.card_guid then
                local card = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
                if card then
                    -- 重置状态
                    card.call("toggleUI", {show=true})
                    card.setVar("temp_debuff", 0)
                    local cGuid = card.getGUID()
                    damage_registry[cGuid] = nil
                    buff_registry[cGuid] = nil
                    
                    -- 飞回卡组 (稍微抬高避免碰撞)
                    card.setPositionSmooth({targetPos.x, targetPos.y + 3 + (count*0.2), targetPos.z})
                    card.setRotationSmooth({0, 180, 180}) -- 盖放
                    count = count + 1
                end
                
                -- 清理格子
                combat_states[zoneGUID] = { active=false, card_guid=nil, equip_guid=nil }
                local zoneObj = getObjectFromGUID(zoneGUID)
                if zoneObj then resetZoneUI(zoneObj) end
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- === 执行：手牌回退 ===
    local handObjs = Player[enemyColor].getHandObjects()
    for _, card in ipairs(handObjs) do
        if card.tag == "Card" then
            card.setPositionSmooth({targetPos.x, targetPos.y + 3 + (count*0.2), targetPos.z})
            card.setRotationSmooth({0, 180, 180})
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    
    -- === 结算与洗牌 ===
    if count > 0 then
        broadcastToAll("📊 统计：共 ["..count.."] 张卡已飞回卡组。", {1,1,0})
        
        -- 延迟 2.5 秒等待卡牌落稳，然后尝试洗牌
        Wait.time(function()
            local objs = deckObj.getObjects() 
            -- 如果 deckObj 本身就是牌堆，直接洗
            if deckObj.tag == "Deck" then
                deckObj.shuffle()
                broadcastToAll("🔀 对方卡组已自动洗牌。", {0.5,1,0.5})
            else
                -- 如果目标是一个区域(ScriptingZone)，或者卡牌刚飞回去形成了一个新牌堆
                -- 这里的逻辑比较复杂，简单提示手动洗牌最稳妥
                broadcastToAll("⚠️ 请对方玩家手动洗切卡组。", {1,1,0})
            end
        end, 2.5)
        
        -- 计算回收奖励
        local recoverCount = math.floor(count / 2)
        if recoverCount > 0 then
            broadcastToAll("✨ [慈悲] 触发：您可以从地狱将 [" .. recoverCount .. "] 张卡送回天堂！(请手动操作)", {0, 1, 0})
        end
    else
        broadcastToAll("💨 对方场上和手牌空空如也，什么也没发生。", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
    end
end

-- ⭐【修复】七大圣专用取消
function click_fs24_cancel(obj, player)
    obj.clearButtons() -- 关键：先清除菜单，告诉系统"我操作完了"
    cancelSpellCast()  -- 然后重置变量
end

-- 辅助：清理按钮并根据效果送去不同地方
-- destType: "Hell" (效果1去地狱) 或 "Heaven" (效果2去天堂)
function cleanup_fs24(spellCard, destType)
    spellCard.clearButtons()
    
    local caster = fs24_context.caster
    local targetGUID = nil
    
    -- 1. 根据类型选择目的地
    if destType == "Heaven" then
        targetGUID = HEAVEN_CONFIG[caster]
        broadcastToAll("🕊️ [七大圣之盟约] 效果2结算：灵魂升入天堂。", {1,1,1})
    else
        -- 默认为地狱 (效果1)
        targetGUID = HELL_CONFIG[caster]
        broadcastToAll("🔥 [七大圣之盟约] 效果1结算：卡牌进入地狱。", {1,0.5,0})
    end
    
    local destObj = getObjectFromGUID(targetGUID)
    
    -- 2. 执行移动
    if destObj then
        local rotY = 180
        if caster == "Green" then rotY = 0 end
        
        if destObj.tag == "Bag" or destObj.tag == "Deck" then
            destObj.putObject(spellCard)
        else
            local p = destObj.getPosition()
            spellCard.setPositionSmooth({p.x, p.y + 3, p.z})
            spellCard.setRotationSmooth({0, rotY, 0}) -- 0=正面朝上
        end
    else
        broadcastToAll("❌ 找不到目标容器 (GUID: "..(targetGUID or "nil")..")，卡牌滞留。", {1,0,0})
    end
    
    -- 3. 重置状态
    spell_casting_state = { active = false }
    monitorCombatZones()
end

-- 效果1: 赋予不灭 + 开启免费召唤
-- 修改：七大圣盟约 - 写入来源名
function click_fs24_opt1(obj, player)
    if player ~= fs24_context.caster then return end
    
    local state = combat_states[fs24_context.target]
    if not state or not state.card_guid then return end
    
    -- (中间的检查标签和不灭逻辑保持不变...)
    
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
    local tags = card.getVar("TAGS") or ""
    local desc = card.getDescription() or ""
    if not string.find(tags, "七大圣") and not string.find(desc, "七大圣") then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 目标卡片没有 [七大圣] 标签，无法签订盟约！", {1,0,0})
        return
    end
    
    API_UpdateBuff({guid=state.card_guid, flags={indestructible=true}})
    broadcastToAll("🛡️ 盟约生效：目标本回合 [不灭] (锁血至1点)！", {0,1,0})
    
    -- ⭐ 修改这里：写入来源名称
    free_summon_pass[fs24_context.caster] = "[七大圣之盟约]"
    
    broadcastToAll("✨ [盟约特召] 权限已开启：\n请从手牌/卡组选 1 张【同名不同】的 [大圣] 神魔卡，\n无需祭品直接拖入场中！", {0,1,1})
    
    cleanup_fs24(obj, "Hell")
end

-- 效果2: 扫描地狱 + 加攻 + 送去天堂 (修复报错版)
-- 效果2: 扫描地狱 (支持单卡、牌堆、袋子混合检测)
function click_fs24_opt2(obj, player)
    if player ~= fs24_context.caster then return end
    
    local state = combat_states[fs24_context.target]
    if not state then return end
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
    local targetName = card.getName()
    
    -- 1. 检查目标名字
    if not string.find(targetName, "大圣") then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 效果2对象必须含有 [大圣] 之名！", {1,0,0})
        return
    end
    
    -- 2. 扫描地狱
    local hellGUID = HELL_CONFIG[fs24_context.caster]
    local hellEntity = getObjectFromGUID(hellGUID)
    local totalATK = 0
    local count = 0
    
    -- 定义一个内嵌函数，用来统一检查名字
    local function checkAndCount(name, desc)
        name = name or ""
        desc = desc or ""
        -- 检查名字含 "大圣" 且 与目标不同名
        if (string.find(name, "大圣") or string.find(desc, "大圣")) 
           and name ~= targetName then
           totalATK = totalATK + 1000000 -- 估算值
           count = count + 1
        end
    end
    
    if hellEntity then
        -- 情况A: HELL_CONFIG 填的是一个袋子或牌堆的GUID
        if hellEntity.tag == "Bag" or hellEntity.tag == "Deck" then
            for _, itemData in ipairs(hellEntity.getObjects()) do
                checkAndCount(itemData.nickname, itemData.description)
            end
            
        -- 情况B: HELL_CONFIG 填的是一个区域 (Scripting Zone) 的GUID
        else
            local zoneObjs = hellEntity.getObjects()
            for _, zObj in ipairs(zoneObjs) do
                -- 1. 如果区域里是【单张卡】
                if zObj.tag == "Card" then
                    checkAndCount(zObj.getName(), zObj.getDescription())
                
                -- 2. ⭐【关键修复】如果区域里是【一摞牌 (Deck)】或【袋子】
                elseif zObj.tag == "Deck" or zObj.tag == "Bag" then
                    -- 获取容器内部的数据表
                    local cardsInside = zObj.getObjects()
                    for _, cardData in ipairs(cardsInside) do
                        -- 注意：容器内数据的名字字段叫 nickname
                        checkAndCount(cardData.nickname, cardData.description)
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    else
        broadcastToAll("⚠️ 未配置地狱区域 (HELL_CONFIG)，无法扫描。", {1,0,0})
    end
    
    -- 3. 执行加攻
    if count > 0 then
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=state.card_guid, atk=totalATK})
        broadcastToAll("🔥 [继承] 发动！\n地狱中响应了 "..count.." 位先烈，攻击力 +"..formatK(totalATK).." (估算值)", {1,0.5,0})
    else
        broadcastToAll("💨 地狱中没有符合条件的 [大圣] 卡牌。", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
    end
    
    cleanup_fs24(obj, "Heaven")
end

    if unit_skill_target_state.func_callback then

    end
    
    --以此结束选人

end

-- === 辅助函数：扫描地狱卡牌数量 ===
function countCardsInHell(player, filterFunc)
    local hellGUID = HELL_CONFIG[player]
    local hellObj = getObjectFromGUID(hellGUID)
    local count = 0
    local foundNames = {} -- 用于去重

    if not hellObj then return 0 end

    -- 内部函数：处理单张卡数据
    local function process(name, desc)
        if filterFunc(name, desc) then
            if not foundNames[name] then
                count = count + 1
                foundNames[name] = true
            end
        end
    end

    if hellObj.tag == "Deck" or hellObj.tag == "Bag" then
        for _, item in ipairs(hellObj.getObjects()) do
            process(item.nickname, item.description)
        end
    else
        -- 假如是ScriptingZone
        for _, obj in ipairs(hellObj.getObjects()) do
            if obj.tag == "Card" then process(obj.getName(), obj.getDescription()) end
        end
    end
    return count
end

-- ========================================================
--  神魔技能实现
-- ========================================================
-- ========================================================
-- [sm1] 齐天大圣-孙悟空 技能实现 (修复版)
-- ========================================================

-- 技能1：此卡每次【对方回合】都有1次机会免被破坏。
function skill_sm1_1(obj, color)
    local guid = obj.getGUID()
    
    -- 1. 【冷却检测】每回合限1次
    -- active_skill_cooldowns 会在 onPlayerTurnStart 中自动清空
    local cdKey = guid .. "_skill_1"
    if active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] then
        broadcastToAll("⏳ [技能] 本回合已使用过，无法再次发动。", {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    -- 2. 【时机检测】严格限制只能在对方回合发动
    if Turns.enable then
        local currentTurn = Turns.turn_color
        -- 获取卡牌所有者
        local owner = color -- 默认为点击者，尝试从战场获取更准确的所有者
        if combat_states then
            for z, s in pairs(combat_states) do
                if s.card_guid == guid then owner = zone_map[z].player; break end
            end
        end

        if currentTurn == owner then
            broadcastToAll("🚫 [规则限制] 此技能仅限在【对方回合】发动！", {1, 0.2, 0.2})
            return
        end
    end

    -- 3. 执行效果
    active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = true -- 记录冷却
    API_UpdateBuff({guid=guid, flags={indestructible=true}})
    
    broadcastToAll("🐒 [齐天大圣] 金刚不坏：\n已开启 [免破坏] 状态！(本回合限1次)", {1, 0.8, 0})
end


-- 技能2：【1次对决】中仅有1次机会，按照我方地狱的神魔卡种类加攻。
function skill_sm1_2(obj, color)
    local cardGUID = obj.getGUID()
    
    -- 1. 【冷却检测】整场对决限1次
    -- 因为 Global 的 active_skill_cooldowns 每回合都会重置，所以不能用它。
    -- 我们将状态直接记录在卡牌物体上，只要卡牌不被删除，记录就一直存在。
    if obj.getVar("duel_skill_used") then
        broadcastToAll("🛑 [技能] 一次对决仅能使用一次！", {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    -- 确定所有者 (防止点别人的卡读错地狱)
    local owner = color 
    if combat_states then
        for zoneGUID, state in pairs(combat_states) do
            if state.card_guid == cardGUID then
                local cfg = zone_map[zoneGUID]
                if cfg then owner = cfg.player end
                break
            end
        end
    end

    -- 获取地狱对象
    local hellGUID = HELL_CONFIG[owner]
    local hellObj = getObjectFromGUID(hellGUID)
    
    if not hellObj then
        broadcastToAll("❌ 找不到 [" .. owner .. "] 方的地狱。", {1,0,0})
        return
    end

    -- 2. 扫描地狱 (支持单卡、牌堆、袋子)
    local unique_names = {}
    local type_count = 0
    local function tally(name)
        if name and name ~= "" and not unique_names[name] then
            unique_names[name] = true
            type_count = type_count + 1
        end
    end

    if hellObj.tag == "Deck" or hellObj.tag == "Bag" then
        for _, data in ipairs(hellObj.getObjects()) do tally(data.nickname) end
    else
        for _, item in ipairs(hellObj.getObjects()) do
            if item.tag == "Card" then tally(item.getName())
            elseif item.tag == "Deck" or item.tag == "Bag" then
                for _, data in ipairs(item.getObjects()) do tally(data.nickname) end
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- 3. 执行效果
    local bonus = type_count * 100000
    if bonus > 0 then
        -- 记录已使用标记 (写入卡牌变量)
        obj.setVar("duel_skill_used", true)
        
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=cardGUID, atk=bonus})
        broadcastToAll("🔥 [齐天大圣] 救兵云集 ("..owner..")！\n感应到地狱中 [" .. type_count .. "] 种神魔，攻击力 +" .. formatK(bonus) .. " (整场限1次)", {1, 0.5, 0})
    else
        broadcastToAll("💨 [齐天大圣] ("..owner..")：地狱空空如也，没能借到力量。", {0.5, 0.5, 0.5})
    end
end

-- ========================================================
-- [通用辅助] 强力卡组查找函数 (修复找不到卡组的问题)
-- ========================================================
local function findDeckRobust(playerColor)
    -- 1. 检查配置是否存在
    if not DECK_CONFIG or not DECK_CONFIG[playerColor] then
        print("❌ 错误：未在 DECK_CONFIG 中找到 [" .. tostring(playerColor) .. "] 方的配置。")
        return nil, "配置缺失"
    end

    local guid = DECK_CONFIG[playerColor]
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)

    if not obj then
        print("❌ 错误：找不到卡组区域对象 (GUID: " .. tostring(guid) .. ")")
        return nil, "区域对象丢失"
    end

    -- 2. 策略A：配置的GUID直接就是卡组/袋子
    if obj.tag == "Deck" or obj.tag == "Bag" then return obj, nil end

    -- 3. 策略B：配置的是区域，遍历内部物体
    local candidates = obj.getObjects()
    for _, item in ipairs(candidates) do
        if item.tag == "Deck" or item.tag == "Bag" then
            return item, nil -- 找到了！
        end
    end

    -- 4. 策略C：物理探测 (防止卡组浮空或稍微偏离区域导致读取失败)
    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    local hitList = Physics.cast({
        origin = pos,
        direction = {0, 1, 0}, -- 向上
        type = 3, -- 盒状探测
        size = {3, 5, 3}, -- 探测范围：3x3区域，高度5
        max_distance = 0
    })
    
    for _, hit in ipairs(hitList) do
        if hit.hit_object.tag == "Deck" or hit.hit_object.tag == "Bag" then
            return hit.hit_object, nil -- 找到了！
        end
    end

    -- 5. 策略D：如果实在没有牌堆，检查是否只剩最后一张【单卡】
    for _, item in ipairs(candidates) do
        if item.tag == "Card" then
            return item, "SingleCard" -- 标记为单卡
        end
    end

    return nil, "该位置没有卡组"
end

-- ========================================================
-- [sm2] 三坛海会大神-哪吒 技能实现 (修复版)
-- ========================================================

-- 技能1 (回合)：从卡组选1张“哪吒”法宝卡装备。
function skill_sm2_1(obj, color)
    local guid = obj.getGUID()
    local cdKey = guid .. "_skill_1"
    if active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] then
        broadcastToAll("⏳ [技能] 本回合已使用过。", {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    -- 获取持有者
    local owner = color
    if combat_states then
        for z, s in pairs(combat_states) do
            if s.card_guid == guid then owner = zone_map[z].player; break end
        end
    end

    -- 查找卡组
    local deckObj, err = findDeckRobust(owner)
    if not deckObj then
        broadcastToAll("⚠️ 无法检索法宝：[" .. owner .. "] " .. (err or "卡组不存在"), {1, 0.5, 0})
        return
    end

    -- 检查装备槽
    local zoneGUID = nil
    for z, s in pairs(combat_states) do if s.card_guid == guid then zoneGUID = z; break end end
    local equipZone = getObjectFromGUID(zone_map[zoneGUID].equip_zone)
    
    -- 简单防重
    for _, o in ipairs(equipZone.getObjects()) do
        if o.tag == "Card" then 
            broadcastToAll("🚫 [哪吒] 装备槽已满！", {1, 0.2, 0.2}); return 
        end
    end

    broadcastToAll("🔍 [哪吒] 正在感应法宝...", {1, 1, 1})

    -- 检索逻辑
    local found = false
    -- 如果是单卡
    if err == "SingleCard" then
        local n = deckObj.getName()
        if string.find(n, "哪吒") or string.find(n, "火尖枪") or string.find(n, "风火轮") or string.find(n, "混天绫") or string.find(n, "乾坤圈") then
            deckObj.setPositionSmooth(equipZone.getPosition())
            broadcastToAll("✨ 法宝 [" .. n .. "] 已装备！", {0, 1, 0})
            active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = true
        else
            broadcastToAll("💨 剩余的那张卡不是哪吒的法宝。", {0.5, 0.5, 0.5})
        end
        return
    end

    -- 如果是牌堆
    for _, data in ipairs(deckObj.getObjects()) do
        local n = data.nickname
        -- 关键词匹配
        if string.find(n, "火尖枪") or string.find(n, "风火轮") or string.find(n, "混天绫") or string.find(n, "乾坤圈") then
            deckObj.takeObject({
                guid = data.guid,
                position = equipZone.getPosition(),
                rotation = {0, (owner=="White" and 180 or 0), 0},
                smooth = true,
                callback_function = function(o) broadcastToAll("✨ 法宝 [" .. o.getName() .. "] 已自动装备！", {0, 1, 0}) end
            })
            found = true
            break
        end
    end

    if found then
        active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = true
    else
        broadcastToAll("💨 卡组中未发现可用的哪吒法宝。", {0.5, 0.5, 0.5})
    end
end


-- 技能2 (触发)：被破坏时，牺牲装备代破。
function skill_sm2_2(obj, color)
    local guid = obj.getGUID()
    -- 获取持有者
    local owner = color
    local zoneGUID = nil
    if combat_states then
        for z, s in pairs(combat_states) do
            if s.card_guid == guid then 
                owner = zone_map[z].player
                zoneGUID = z
                break 
            end
        end
    end

    local state = combat_states[zoneGUID]
    if not state or not state.equip_guid then
        broadcastToAll("🚫 [哪吒] 没有装备法宝，无法发动莲花化身！", {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    local equipObj = getObjectFromGUID(state.equip_guid)
    if equipObj then
        broadcastToAll("🪷 [哪吒] 莲花化身：牺牲法宝 [" .. equipObj.getName() .. "] 代替破坏！", {0, 1, 1})
        
        -- 送去地狱
        local hellGUID = HELL_CONFIG[owner]
        local hellObj = getObjectFromGUID(hellGUID)
        if hellObj and (hellObj.tag == "Bag" or hellObj.tag == "Deck") then
            hellObj.putObject(equipObj)
        elseif hellObj then
            equipObj.setPositionSmooth(hellObj.getPosition())
        else
            equipObj.destruct()
        end
        
        -- 恢复生命
        damage_registry[guid] = 0
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=guid, flags={indestructible=true}}) -- 本回合锁血
        monitorCombatZones()
    end
end


-- 技能3 (回合)：回卡组 -> 特召灵珠。
function skill_sm2_3(obj, color)
    local guid = obj.getGUID()
    local cdKey = guid .. "_skill_3"
    if active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] then
        broadcastToAll("⏳ [技能] 本回合已使用过。", {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    local owner = color
    local zoneGUID = nil
    if combat_states then
        for z, s in pairs(combat_states) do
            if s.card_guid == guid then 
                owner = zone_map[z].player
                zoneGUID = z
                break 
            end
        end
    end

    -- 1. 查找卡组
    local deckObj, err = findDeckRobust(owner)
    
    -- 特殊处理：如果卡组区彻底空了，deckObj 为 nil，但我们仍需把哪吒放回去
    local deckZonePos = nil
    local deckZoneObj = getObjectFromGUID(DECK_CONFIG[owner])
    if deckZoneObj then deckZonePos = deckZoneObj.getPosition() end
    
    if not deckObj and not deckZonePos then
        broadcastToAll("⚠️ 找不到卡组区域，无法轮回。", {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    -- 2. 搜索灵珠
    local lingZhuGUID = nil
    if deckObj then
        if err == "SingleCard" then
            if string.find(deckObj.getName(), "灵珠") then lingZhuGUID = deckObj.getGUID() end
        else
            for _, data in ipairs(deckObj.getObjects()) do
                if string.find(data.nickname, "灵珠") then lingZhuGUID = data.guid; break end
            end
        end
    end

    if not lingZhuGUID then
        broadcastToAll("🚫 卡组中未找到 [灵珠]，无法轮回。", {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    broadcastToAll("🔄 [哪吒] 剔骨还父... [灵珠] 转世！", {0.5, 0.8, 1})

    -- 3. 哪吒回卡组
    combat_states[zoneGUID] = { active=false }
    damage_registry[guid] = nil
    buff_registry[guid] = nil
    obj.clearButtons()
    safeCall(obj, "toggleUI", {show=true})

    if deckObj and deckObj.tag == "Deck" then
        deckObj.putObject(obj)
    elseif deckZonePos then
        obj.setPositionSmooth({deckZonePos.x, deckZonePos.y + 2, deckZonePos.z})
        obj.setRotationSmooth({0, 180, 180})
    end

    -- 4. 灵珠特召 (延迟执行以等待物理结算)
    Wait.time(function()
        local dObj, dErr = findDeckRobust(owner) -- 再次查找
        local zPos = getObjectFromGUID(zoneGUID).getPosition()
        
        if dObj then
            -- 如果灵珠就在顶上/是单卡
            if dErr == "SingleCard" and dObj.getGUID() == lingZhuGUID then
                dObj.setPositionSmooth(zPos)
                dObj.setRotationSmooth({0, (owner=="White" and 180 or 0), 0})
                broadcastToAll("🌟 [灵珠] 已降临！", {1, 1, 0})
                monitorCombatZones()
            else
                -- 从堆里取
                dObj.takeObject({
                    guid = lingZhuGUID,
                    position = zPos,
                    rotation = {0, (owner=="White" and 180 or 0), 0},
                    callback_function = function(o)
                        o.setLock(true); Wait.time(function() o.setLock(false) end, 0.5)
                        broadcastToAll("🌟 [灵珠] 已降临！", {1, 1, 0})
                        monitorCombatZones()
                        safeCall(o, "confirmSummon", {atk=0, hp=0})
                    end
                })
                if dObj.tag == "Deck" then dObj.shuffle() end
            end
        end
    end, 1.5)
    
    active_skill_cooldowns[cdKey] = true
end

    broadcastToAll("🔍 [二郎神] 哮天犬搜寻：\n请从牌组选1张名字不同的“二郎神”加入手牌。", {1,1,0})
end

function skill_sm3_3(obj, color) -- 回合：削弱敌方
    unit_skill_target_state = { active=true, caster=color, source_guid=obj.getGUID(), func_callback="cb_sm3_3" }
    broadcastToAll("👁️ [二郎神] 审判：请选择人界一张神魔卡进行削弱！", {1,0,0})
    monitorCombatZones()
end
function cb_sm3_3(source, caster, targetZone)
    local state = combat_states[targetZone]
    if not state then return end
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
    
    local penalty = math.floor(state.atk * 0.2)
    local current_debuff = card.getVar("temp_debuff") or 0
    local new_debuff = current_debuff + penalty
    card.setVar("temp_debuff", new_debuff)
    
    broadcastToAll("📉 [审判] "..card.getName().." 攻击力下降 "..formatK(penalty), {1,0.5,0})
    
    -- 检查斩杀线
    local final_atk = state.atk - penalty -- 估算
    if final_atk <= 200000 then
        broadcastToAll("💀 天眼灭杀！目标攻击力过低，直接破坏！", {1,0,0})
        handleZoneDeath(targetZone, state, zone_map[targetZone].grave)
    end
end

    local count = 0
    local hellObj = getObjectFromGUID(HELL_CONFIG[color])

        count = #hellObj.getObjects()
    end
    -- 假设地狱里大概 1/3 是高星卡

    if bonus > 0 then
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=obj.getGUID(), atk=bonus})
        broadcastToAll("💪 力量涌现！攻击力 +"..formatK(bonus).." (基于地狱估算)", {1,0,0})
    else
        broadcastToAll("💪 地狱空荡，无法借力。", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
    end
end

-- [sm18] 白蛇 / [sm19] 青蛇
function skill_sm18_1(obj, color) -- 白蛇：根据青蛇加攻
    local count = 0
    -- 简单起见，只扫描人界。若要扫描全场(地狱/天堂)需要复杂遍历。
    for guid, cfg in pairs(zone_map) do
        if cfg.player == color then
            local state = combat_states[guid]
            if state and state.card_guid then
                local card = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
                if string.find(card.getName(), "青蛇") then count = count + 1 end
            end
        end
    end
    -- 翻倍 = 原值 * (1 + count) ? 描述是"每有1张加1倍"。
    -- 1张 -> 2倍(x2)。2张 -> 3倍(x3)。
    local mult = 1 + count
    if mult > 1 then
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=obj.getGUID(), atk_mult=mult})
        broadcastToAll("🐍 [白蛇] 姐妹情深：发现"..count.."张青蛇，攻击力 x"..mult, {1,1,1})
    else
        broadcastToAll("🐍 [白蛇] 孤单：场上没有青蛇。", {0.5,0.5,0.5})
    end
end
function skill_sm18_2(obj, color) broadcastToAll("🛡️ [白蛇] 守护：敌方不能攻击其他蛇。",{1,1,1}) end
function skill_sm18_3(obj, color) handleCardExit(obj.getGUID()); broadcastToAll("🔄 替换同名白蛇。",{1,1,1}) end

function skill_sm19_1(obj, color) -- 青蛇：根据白蛇加攻
    local count = 0
    for guid, cfg in pairs(zone_map) do
        if cfg.player == color then
            local state = combat_states[guid]
            if state and state.card_guid then
                local card = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
                if string.find(card.getName(), "白蛇") then count = count + 1 end

    local mult = 1 + count
    if mult > 1 then

    else

end
