function createOrEditZoneButton(zone, params) local guid=zone.getGUID(); local cfg=zone_map[guid]; local zp=-0.7; if cfg and cfg.row==1 then zp=-0.5 end; if not zone.getButtons() then zone.createButton({label=params.label, click_function=params.click_function, function_owner=self, position={0, -0.1, zp}, rotation={0,180,0}, width=600, height=200, color=params.color, font_color=params.font_color, font_size=60, font_style="Bold"}) else zone.editButton({index=0, label=params.label, click_function=params.click_function, color=params.color, font_color=params.font_color}) end end
function resetZoneUI(zone) if zone.getButtons() then zone.editButton({index=0, label="[ 空闲 ]", click_function="none", color={1,1,1,1}, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5,1}}) else createOrEditZoneButton(zone, {label="[ 空闲 ]", click_function="none", color={1,1,1,1}, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5,1}}) end end
function click_summon(obj, color) local g=obj.getGUID(); local s=combat_states[g]; performSummon(obj, color, getObjectFromGUID(s.card_guid), getObjectFromGUID(s.card_guid).call("getSummonRequirements"), zone_map[g].grave, obj) end
-- 修改：核心召唤流程 (支持免费召唤)
-- 修改：核心召唤流程 (支持动态来源提示)
function performSummon(obj, color, targetCard, req, graveGUID, btnObj) 
    local p = Player[color]
    local selectedObjs = p.getSelectedObjects()
    local tributes = {}
    
    -- 筛选祭品
    for _, v in ipairs(selectedObjs) do 
        if v.tag == "Card" and v ~= targetCard then 
            table.insert(tributes, v) 
        end 
    end

    -- === ⭐【核心修改】判定是否拥有免费召唤权限 ===
    local sourceName = free_summon_pass[color]
    
    if sourceName then
        broadcastToAll("🆓 " .. sourceName .. " 效果生效：免除所有祭品！", {0,1,1})
        free_summon_pass[color] = nil 
        
        -- 直接进场，不处理祭品
        local atk, hp = targetCard.call("confirmSummon", {atk=0, hp=0})
        
        -- 【修复关键点】召唤后强制关闭卡牌自带UI，防止覆盖技能按钮
        safeCall(targetCard, "toggleUI", {show=false})
        
        broadcastToAll("🌟 降临成功！", {0,1,0})
        
        -- 刷新UI
        local zone = zone_map[obj.getGUID()]
        if zone then
            Wait.time(function() updateStatsUI(obj, atk, hp) end, 0.2)
        end
        return -- 结束函数
    end
    -- ==============================

    if req.is_supreme then 
        if #tributes ~= 5 then 
            broadcastToAll("❌ 超绝降临需要 5 张祭品！", {1,0,0}) 
            return 
        end 
    else 
        if #tributes < req.cost then 
            broadcastToAll("❌ 祭品不足 (需要 "..req.cost.." 张)", {1,0,0}) 
            return 
        end 
    end
    
    -- 献祭过程
    local grave = getObjectFromGUID(graveGUID)
    local gravePos = grave.getPosition()
    
    for _, v in ipairs(tributes) do 
        v.setPositionSmooth({gravePos.x, gravePos.y + 1, gravePos.z}) 
        v.call("toggleUI", {show=true})
    end
    
    -- 确认召唤
    local atk, hp = targetCard.call("confirmSummon", {atk=0, hp=0})
    
    -- 【修复关键点】召唤后强制关闭卡牌自带UI
    safeCall(targetCard, "toggleUI", {show=false})
    
    broadcastToAll("🌟 降临成功！", {0,1,0})
    updateStatsUI(obj, atk, hp) 
end

function initCardLogic(z,c,g) c.call("toggleUI", {show=false}) end
function handleCardExit(id) 
    if not id then return end
    local c = getObjectFromGUID(id)
    if c then 
        -- 1. 强制清除全局脚本加的按钮 (解决手牌UI残留)
        c.clearButtons()
        
        -- 2. 尝试恢复卡片自身的UI (如果它支持的话)
        -- 使用 safeCall，如果卡片不支持，什么都不会发生，也不会报错
        safeCall(c, "toggleUI", {show=true})
        
        -- 只有当它确实像个怪兽时，才去重置数值显示
        if safeGetVar(c, "DEFAULT_ATK") then
            local def_atk = safeGetVar(c, "DEFAULT_ATK") or 0
            local def_hp = safeGetVar(c, "DEFAULT_HP") or 0
            safeCall(c, "setUIDisplay", {atk=def_atk, hp=def_hp})
            c.setVar("temp_debuff", 0)
        end
    end 
end
function updateStatsUI(z,a,h) createOrEditZoneButton(z, {label=formatK(a).." | "..formatK(h), click_function="none", color={1,1,1,1}, font_color={0,0,0,1}}) end
function showSummonUI(z, r) createOrEditZoneButton(z, {label="⚡ 召唤\n("..r.cost..")", click_function="click_summon", color={1,0.8,0.2,1}, font_color={0,0,0,1}}) end
function click_target(obj) resolveCombat(obj.getGUID()) end
function click_cancel_attack() current_attacker=nil; broadcastToAll("取消", {0.5,0.5,0.5}) end
function click_debug_test(obj, c, alt) debugDealDamage(alt and "White" or "Green", 50000) end
function debugDealDamage(p,v) for _,c in ipairs(COMBAT_CONFIG) do if c.player==p then local s=combat_states[c.zone]; if s and s.active then s.hp=s.hp-v; if s.hp<=0 then handleZoneDeath(c.zone,s,c.grave) else monitorCombatZones() end break end end end end
function createCardMonitorButtons() local base=getObjectFromGUID(BASE_GUID); if not base then return end; local p={{1.22,0.2,0.7},{1.22,0.2,0.3},{-1.22,0.2,0.3},{-1.22,0.2,-0.7},{-1.22,0.2,-0.3},{1.22,0.2,-0.3}}; for i=1,6 do base.createButton({click_function="none",function_owner=self,label="0",position=p[i],scale={0.2,0.2,0.2},width=0,height=0,font_size=600,font_color={1,1,1,100}}) end end
function createToggleButtons() local base=getObjectFromGUID(BASE_GUID); if not base then return end; base.createButton({click_function="togglePlayerBattlefield",function_owner=self,label="切换战场",position=originalButtonPosition,width=300,height=50,font_size=50,color={0.2,0.6,0.8},font_color={1,1,1}}); base.createButton({click_function="toggleOppositeBattlefield",function_owner=self,label="切换战场",position=oppositeButtonPosition,width=300,height=50,rotation={0,180,0},font_size=50,color={0.8,0.3,0.3},font_color={1,1,1}}) end
function createDebugButton() local b=getObjectFromGUID(BASE_GUID); if b then b.createButton({label="🧪",click_function="click_debug_test",function_owner=self,position={0,0.2,0},width=200,height=200}) end end
function togglePlayerBattlefield() spawnNextBattlefield(areaGuid, spawnPosition, false) end
function toggleOppositeBattlefield() spawnNextBattlefield(oppositeAreaGuid, oppositeSpawnPosition, true) end
function spawnNextBattlefield(a,p,o) local bag=getObjectFromGUID(bagGuid); bag.takeObject({index=0, position=p, rotation={0,o and 0 or 180,0}, callback_function=function(obj) obj.setLock(true); bag.putObject(obj) end}) end
function updateDisplayButton(idx, c) local base=getObjectFromGUID(BASE_GUID); if base and base.getButtons() and base.getButtons()[idx] then base.editButton({index=base.getButtons()[idx].index, label=tostring(c)}) end end
function calculateTotalCards(idx) local guid=zoneGUIDs[idx]; if not guid then return 0 end; local z=getObjectFromGUID(guid); if not z then return 0 end; local t=0; for _, o in ipairs(z.getObjects()) do if o.tag=="Card" then t=t+1 elseif o.tag=="Deck" then t=t+o.getQuantity() elseif o.type=="Bag" then for _, c in ipairs(o.getObjects()) do if c.tag=="Card" then t=t+1 end end end end; return t end
function checkCardCount() for i=1,6 do local c=calculateTotalCards(i); updateDisplayButton(i,c); lastCardCounts[i]=c end end
function isValidTarget(tc) if not current_attacker then return false end; local ac=zone_map[current_attacker.zone_guid]; if ac.player==tc.player then return false end; local ts=combat_states[tc.zone]; if not ts or not ts.active or not ts.is_summoned then return false end; local ef=hasFrontRowUnits(tc.player); local as=combat_states[current_attacker.zone_guid]; local iw=as.flags and as.flags.ignore_wall; if ef and tc.row==2 and not iw then return false end; return true end
function isCardSummoned(card) local req=card.call("getSummonRequirements"); return not req or req.cost==0 or req.is_summoned end

-- ========================================================
--  [核心修复] 宣战与战斗系统
-- ========================================================

function click_declare_attack(obj, color)
    local zoneGUID = obj.getGUID()
    local cfg = zone_map[zoneGUID]
    if not cfg or cfg.player ~= color then broadcastToAll("❌ 你只能操作自己的卡牌", {1,0,0}) return end
    if attack_locks[combat_states[zoneGUID].card_guid] then broadcastToAll("🚫 此卡已被锁定，无法攻击！", {1,0,0}) return end

    current_attacker = { zone_guid = zoneGUID, player = color, card_guid = combat_states[zoneGUID].card_guid }
    broadcastToAll("⚔️ " .. color .. " 方宣战！请点击红色 [🎯 目标] 选择攻击对象。", {1,1,1})
    monitorCombatZones() 
end

-- 修改：战斗结算（支持锁血 + 金箍棒/月神弓成长 + 宇宙收缩）
function resolveCombat(targetZoneGUID)
    if not current_attacker then return end
    
    local atkZoneGUID = current_attacker.zone_guid
    local atkCfg = zone_map[atkZoneGUID]
    local targetCfg = zone_map[targetZoneGUID]
    local atkState = combat_states[atkZoneGUID]
    local targetState = combat_states[targetZoneGUID]
    
    if not atkState or not targetState then return end
    local atkCard = getObjectFromGUID(atkState.card_guid)
    local targetCard = getObjectFromGUID(targetState.card_guid)
    if not atkCard or not targetCard then return end

    -- === 1. 获取基础攻击力 ===
    local final_attacker_atk = atkState.atk
    local final_defender_atk = targetState.atk -- 并没有反击伤害，但我们需要这个数值做记录或对比
    
    -- === 2. 处理 [宇宙收缩] 逻辑 ===
    -- 逻辑：如果攻击者有 universe_shrink，则削弱防御者；如果防御者有，则削弱攻击者？
    -- 描述：“该卡这回合有1次机会与对方神魔卡战斗时...”
    -- 假设只有“攻击时”触发（或者被攻击也触发）。通常这种Buff是双向的。
    -- 这里我们只处理：如果【我方（攻击者）】有宇宙收缩，则【敌方（防御者）】被削弱。
    -- (如果需要防御时也触发，请告知，目前按攻击触发写)
    
    if atkState.flags and atkState.flags.universe_shrink then
        -- 获取防御者的祭品数
        local req = targetCard.call("getSummonRequirements")
        local cost = (req and req.cost) or 0
        
        if cost > 0 then
            -- 每1个祭品扣除 50% 力量 (即剩余力量 = 原力量 * (1 - 0.5 * cost))
            -- 举例：1个祭品剩50%，2个祭品剩0%，3个祭品...这就成负数了？
            -- 通常“扣除力量值50%”是指：扣除 50% * 祭品数。
            -- 比如祭品2，就是扣 100%。祭品3，扣 150% (这就变0了)。
            
            local reduction_pct = 0.5 * cost
            local defender_base_atk = targetCard.getVar("DEFAULT_ATK") or 0
            if defender_base_atk == 0 then local a,_=targetCard.call("getBaseStats"); defender_base_atk=a or 0 end
            
            -- 计算由于宇宙收缩导致的攻击力削减量 (这是Debuff，通常不影响这一刀的伤害，而是影响“战斗结果”？)
            -- 等等，TTS的这个脚本系统是“单向攻击”模型（直接扣血），还是“对撞”模型？
            -- 看代码逻辑：`current_hp = max_hp - damage`，是直接扣血。
            -- 既然是直接扣血，那削弱敌方攻击力有什么用？
            -- 答：在目前的脚本里，防御者是不反击的。
            -- **修正理解**：宇宙收缩的效果如果是“战斗时...扣除力量”，在单向攻击模型下，
            -- 可能是指：**无视敌方的防御/反伤**？或者**增加我方的伤害**？
            -- 但原文是“那张对方神魔卡...扣除力量”。
            
            -- ⚠️ 重要假设：既然脚本里没有“反击伤害”，那么“削弱敌方攻击力”在当前脚本里其实**没有任何实际效果**（因为敌人不打你）。
            -- **除非**：您希望这个削弱是**永久的**（战斗后保留Debuff），或者脚本有反击逻辑。
            -- **实现方案**：我将把这个削弱做成**给敌人施加 Debuff**。
            
            local penalty = math.floor(defender_base_atk * reduction_pct)
            local current_debuff = targetCard.getVar("temp_debuff") or 0
            targetCard.setVar("temp_debuff", current_debuff + penalty)
            
            broadcastToAll("🌌 [宇宙收缩] 生效！\n敌方祭品为 "..cost.."，攻击力削减 -"..formatK(penalty).." ("..(cost*50).."%)", {0, 0.5, 1})
            
            -- 刷新一下敌人的显示
            monitorCombatZones()
        end
        
        -- 效果是一次性的，用完移除标记
        atkState.flags.universe_shrink = nil
        API_UpdateBuff({guid=atkState.card_guid, flags={universe_shrink=false}})
    end

    -- === 3. 计算最终伤害 (攻击者 -> 防御者) ===
    local damage = final_attacker_atk
    
    -- [战神金矛] 即死检测
    if atkState.flags and atkState.flags.instant_kill then 
        damage = 99999999 
        broadcastToAll("⚡ [战神金矛] 即死发动！", {1,0,0}) 
    end
    
    -- [混天绫] 伤害免疫检测
    if targetState.flags and targetState.flags.damage_immune then 
        damage = 0
        broadcastToAll("🛡️ [伤害免疫] 生效，本次伤害为 0！", {1,1,0}) 
    end
    
    -- === 4. 结算血量 ===
    local cGuid = targetState.card_guid
    local base_hp = targetCard.getVar("DEFAULT_HP") or 0
    if base_hp == 0 then local _,h = targetCard.call("getBaseStats"); base_hp = h or 0 end
    
    local buff = buff_registry[cGuid] or {hp_mult=1}
    local max_hp = math.floor(base_hp * buff.hp_mult)
    
    local current_damage_total = damage_registry[cGuid] or 0
    local new_damage_total = current_damage_total + damage
    
    -- [风火轮] 锁血
    if targetState.flags and targetState.flags.indestructible then
        local damage_limit = max_hp - 1
        if new_damage_total > damage_limit then
            new_damage_total = damage_limit
            broadcastToAll("🔥 [不灭金身] 触发！生命值锁定为 1 点！", {1, 0.5, 0})
        end
    end
    
    damage_registry[cGuid] = new_damage_total
    local real_damage_dealt = new_damage_total - current_damage_total
    
    if damage > 0 then
        broadcastToAll("⚔️ 造成伤害: " .. formatK(real_damage_dealt), {1,1,1})
    end

    local current_hp = max_hp - damage_registry[cGuid]
    
    if current_hp <= 0 then
        broadcastToAll("💥 击破！" .. targetCard.getName() .. " 退场！", {1,0,0})
        handleZoneDeath(targetZoneGUID, targetState, targetCfg.grave)
    else
        broadcastToAll("🩸 " .. targetCard.getName() .. " 剩余生命: " .. formatK(current_hp), {1,0.5,0.5})
    end
    
    -- === 5. 攻击后成长特效 (金箍棒/月神弓) ===
    if atkState.equip_guid then
        local equipObj = getObjectFromGUID(atkState.equip_guid)
        local eid = equipObj and equipObj.getVar("EQUIP_ID")
        
        if eid == 1 then -- 金箍棒
             API_UpdateBuff({guid=atkState.card_guid, atk_mult=1.3})
             broadcastToAll("🐵 [如意金箍棒] 连击！攻击力 x1.3", {1,0.5,0})
        end
        if eid == 12 then -- 月神弓箭
             API_UpdateBuff({guid=atkState.card_guid, atk_mult=1.2})
             broadcastToAll("🏹 [月神弓箭] 连射！攻击力 x1.2", {0.5,0.8,1})
        end
    end

    -- 攻击疲劳
    if not (atkState.flags and atkState.flags.multi_attack) then 
        attacks_this_turn[atkState.card_guid] = true 
    end
    
    current_attacker = nil
    monitorCombatZones()
end

-- ========================================================
--  [核心修复] 卡牌销毁/送墓处理函数
-- ========================================================
function handleZoneDeath(zoneGUID, state, graveGUID)
    local zone = getObjectFromGUID(zoneGUID)
    local card = getObjectFromGUID(state.card_guid)
    local grave = getObjectFromGUID(graveGUID)
    
    if card then
        card.clearButtons() -- 强制清除按钮
        
        -- 尝试恢复状态，不报错
        safeCall(card, "toggleUI", {show=true})
        
        if safeGetVar(card, "DEFAULT_ATK") then
            local def_atk = safeGetVar(card, "DEFAULT_ATK") or 0
            local def_hp = safeGetVar(card, "DEFAULT_HP") or 0
            safeCall(card, "setUIDisplay", {atk=def_atk, hp=def_hp})
            card.setVar("temp_debuff", 0)
        end
        
        -- 清除数据
        local cGuid = card.getGUID()
        damage_registry[cGuid] = nil
        buff_registry[cGuid] = nil
        
        if grave then
            local p = grave.getPosition()
            card.setPositionSmooth({p.x, p.y + 2, p.z})
            card.setRotationSmooth({0, 0, 180})
        else
            card.destruct() 
        end
    end
    combat_states[zoneGUID] = { active=false, card_guid=nil, equip_guid=nil }
    if zone then resetZoneUI(zone) end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Chinese_Checkers_Piece
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
tableHeightOffset = -9

function onSave()
    saved_data = JSON.encode({tid=tableImageData, cd=checkData})
    --saved_data = ""
    return saved_data
end

function onload(saved_data)
    --Loads the tracking for if the game has started yet
    if saved_data ~= "" then
         local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
         tableImageData = loaded_data.tid
         checkData = loaded_data.cd
    else
        tableImageData = {}
        checkData = {move=false, scale=false}
    end

    --Disables interactable status of objects with GUID in list
    for _, guid in ipairs(ref_noninteractable) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        if obj then obj.interactable = false end
    end

    --Establish references to table parts
    obj_leg1 = getObjectFromGUID("afc863")
    obj_leg2 = getObjectFromGUID("c8edca")
    obj_leg3 = getObjectFromGUID("393bf7")
    obj_leg4 = getObjectFromGUID("12c65e")
    obj_surface = getObjectFromGUID("4ee1f2")
    obj_side_top = getObjectFromGUID("35b95f")
    obj_side_bot = getObjectFromGUID("f938a2")
    obj_side_lef = getObjectFromGUID("9f95fd")
    obj_side_rig = getObjectFromGUID("5af8f2")

    controlActive = false
    createOpenCloseButton()
end



--Activation/deactivation of control panel



--Activated by clicking on
function click_toggleControl(_, color)
    if permissionCheck(color) then
        if not controlActive then
            --Activate control panel
            controlActive = true
            self.clearButtons()
            createOpenCloseButton()
            createSurfaceInput()
            createSurfaceButtons()
            createScaleInput()
            createScaleButtons()
        else
            --Deactivate control panel
            controlActive = false
            self.clearButtons()
            self.clearInputs()
            createOpenCloseButton()

        end
    end
end




--Table surface control



--Changes table surface
function click_applySurface(_, color)
    if permissionCheck(color) then
        updateSurface()
        broadcastToAll("New Table Image Applied", {0.2,0.9,0.2})
    end
end

--Saves table surface
function click_saveSurface(_, color)
    if permissionCheck(color) then
        local nickname = self.getInputs()[1].value
        local url = self.getInputs()[2].value
        if nickname == "" then
            --No nickname
            broadcastToAll("Please supply a nickname for this save.", {0.9,0.2,0.2})
        else
            --Nickname exists

            if findInImageDataIndex(url, nickname) == nil then
                --Save doesn't exist already
                table.insert(tableImageData, {url=url, name=nickname})
                broadcastToAll("Image URL saved to memory.", {0.2,0.9,0.2})
                --Refresh buttons
                self.clearButtons()
                createOpenCloseButton()
                createSurfaceButtons()
                createScaleButtons()
            else
                --Save exists already
                broadcastToAll("Memory already contains a save with this Name or URL. Delete it first.", {0.9,0.2,0.2})
            end
        end
    end
end

--Loads table surface
function click_loadMemory(_, color, index)
    if permissionCheck(color) then
        self.editInput({index=0, value=tableImageData[index].name})
        self.editInput({index=1, value=tableImageData[index].url})
        updateSurface()
        broadcastToAll("Table Image Loaded", {0.2,0.9,0.2})
    end
end

--Deletes table surface
function click_deleteMemory(_, color, index)
    if permissionCheck(color) then
        table.remove(tableImageData, index)
        self.clearButtons()
        createOpenCloseButton()
        createSurfaceButtons()
        createScaleButtons()
        broadcastToAll("Element Removed from Memory", {0.2,0.9,0.2})
    end
end

--Updates surface from the values in the input field
function updateSurface()
    local customInfo = obj_surface.getCustomObject()
    customInfo.diffuse = self.getInputs()[2].value
    obj_surface.setCustomObject(customInfo)
    obj_surface = obj_surface.reload()
end



--Table Scale control



--Applies Scale to table pieces
function click_applyScale(_, color)
    if permissionCheck(color) then
        local newWidth = tonumber(self.getInputs()[3].value)
        local newDepth = tonumber(self.getInputs()[4].value)
        if type(newWidth) ~= "number" then
            broadcastToAll("Invalid Width", {0.9,0.2,0.2})
            return
        elseif type(newDepth) ~= "number" then
            broadcastToAll("Invalid Depth", {0.9,0.2,0.2})
            return
        elseif newWidth<0.1 or newDepth<0.1 then
            broadcastToAll("Scale cannot go below 0.1", {0.9,0.2,0.2})
            return
        elseif newWidth>12 or newDepth>12 then
            broadcastToAll("Scale should not go over 12 (world size limitation)", {0.9,0.2,0.2})
            return
        else
            changeTableScale(math.abs(newWidth), math.abs(newDepth))
            broadcastToAll("Scale applied.", {0.2,0.9,0.2})
        end
    end
end

--Checks/unchecks move box for hands
function click_checkMove(_, color)
    if permissionCheck(color) then
        local find_func = function(o) return o.click_function=="click_checkMove" end
        if checkData.move == true then
            checkData.move = false
            local buttonEntry = findButton(self, find_func)
            self.editButton({index=buttonEntry.index, label=""})
        else
            checkData.move = true
            local buttonEntry = findButton(self, find_func)
            self.editButton({index=buttonEntry.index, label=string.char(10008)})
        end
    end
end

--Checks/unchecks scale box for hands
--This button was disabled for technical reasons
--[[
function click_checkScale(_, color)
    if permissionCheck(color) then
        local find_func = function(o) return o.click_function=="click_checkScale" end
        if checkData.scale == true then
            checkData.scale = false
            local buttonEntry = findButton(self, find_func)
            self.editButton({index=buttonEntry.index, label=""})
        else
            checkData.scale = true
            local buttonEntry = findButton(self, find_func)
            self.editButton({index=buttonEntry.index, label=string.char(10008)})
        end
    end
end
]]

--Alters scale of elements and moves them
function changeTableScale(width, depth)
    --Scaling factors used to translate scale to position offset
    local width2pos = (width-1) * 18
    local depth2pos = (depth-1) * 18

    --Hand zone movement
    if checkData.move == true then
        for _, pc in ipairs(ref_playerColor) do
            if Player[pc].getHandCount() > 0 then
                moveHandZone(Player[pc], width2pos, depth2pos)
            end
        end
    end
    --Hand zone scaling
    --The button to enable this was disabled for technical reasons
    if checkData.scale == true then
        for _, pc in ipairs(ref_playerColor) do
            if Player[pc].getHandCount() > 0 then
                scaleHandZone(Player[pc], width, depth)
            end
        end
    end

    --Resizing table elements
    obj_side_top.setScale({width, 1, 1})
    obj_side_bot.setScale({width, 1, 1})
    obj_side_lef.setScale({depth, 1, 1})
    obj_side_rig.setScale({depth, 1, 1})
    obj_surface.setScale({width, 1, depth})

    --Moving table elements to accomodate new scale
    obj_side_lef.setPosition({-width2pos,tableHeightOffset,0})
    obj_side_rig.setPosition({ width2pos,tableHeightOffset,0})
    obj_side_top.setPosition({0,tableHeightOffset, depth2pos})
    obj_side_bot.setPosition({0,tableHeightOffset,-depth2pos})
    obj_leg1.setPosition({-width2pos,tableHeightOffset,-depth2pos})
    obj_leg2.setPosition({-width2pos,tableHeightOffset, depth2pos})
    obj_leg3.setPosition({ width2pos,tableHeightOffset, depth2pos})
    obj_leg4.setPosition({ width2pos,tableHeightOffset,-depth2pos})
    self.setPosition(obj_leg4.positionToWorld({-22.12, 8.74,-19.16}))
    --Only enabled when changing tableHeightOffset
    --obj_surface.setPosition({0,tableHeightOffset,0})
end

--Move hand zone, p=player reference, facts are scaling factors
function moveHandZone(p, width2pos, depth2pos)
    local widthX = obj_side_rig.getPosition().x
    local depthZ = obj_side_top.getPosition().z
    for i=1, p.getHandCount() do
        local handT = p.getHandTransform()
        local pos = handT.position
        local y = handT.rotation.y

        if y<45 or y>320 or y>135 and y<225 then
            if pos.z > 0 then
                pos.z = pos.z + depth2pos - depthZ
            else
                pos.z = pos.z - depth2pos + depthZ
            end
        else
            if pos.x > 0 then
                pos.x = pos.x + width2pos - widthX
            else
                pos.x = pos.x - width2pos + widthX
            end
        end

        --Only enabled when changing tableHeightOffset
        --pos.y = tableHeightOffset + 14

        handT.position = pos
        p.setHandTransform(handT, i)
    end
end


---Scales hand zones, p=player reference, facts are scaling factors
function scaleHandZone(p, width, depth)
    local widthFact = width / obj_side_top.getScale().x
    local depthFact = depth / obj_side_lef.getScale().x
    for i=1, p.getHandCount() do
        local handT = p.getHandTransform()
        local scale = handT.scale
        local y = handT.rotation.y
        if y<45 or y>320 or y>135 and y<225 then
            scale.x = scale.x * widthFact
        else
            scale.x = scale.x * depthFact
        end
        handT.scale = scale
        p.setHandTransform(handT, i)
    end
end



--Information gathering



--Checks if a color is promoted or host
function permissionCheck(color)
    if Player[color].host==true or Player[color].promoted==true then
        return true
    else
        return false
    end
end

--Locates a string saved within memory file
function findInImageDataIndex(...)
    for _, str in ipairs({...}) do
        for i, v in ipairs(tableImageData) do
            if v.url == str or v.name == str then
                return i
            end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

--Round number (num) to the Nth decimal (dec)
function round(num, dec)
  local mult = 10^(dec or 0)
  return math.floor(num * mult + 0.5) / mult
end

--Locates a button with a helper function
function findButton(obj, func)
    if func==nil then error("No func supplied to findButton") end
    for _, v in ipairs(obj.getButtons()) do
        if func(v) then
            return v
        end
    end
    return nil
end



--Creation of buttons/inputs



function createOpenCloseButton()
    local tooltip = "Open Table Control Panel"
    if controlActive then
        tooltip = "Close Table Control Panel"
    end
    self.createButton({
        click_function="click_toggleControl", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0,0}, rotation={-45,0,0}, height=400, width=400,
        color={1,1,1,0}, tooltip=tooltip
    })
end

function createSurfaceInput()
    local currentURL = obj_surface.getCustomObject().diffuse
    local nickname = ""
    if findInImageDataIndex(currentURL) ~= nil then
        nickname = tableImageData[findInImageDataIndex(currentURL)].name
    end
    self.createInput({
        label="Nickname", input_function="none", function_owner=self,
        alignment=3, position={0,0,2}, height=224, width=4000,
        font_size=200, tooltip="Enter nickname for table image (only used for save)",
        value=nickname
    })
    self.createInput({
        label="URL", input_function="none", function_owner=self,
        alignment=3, position={0,0,3}, height=224, width=4000,
        font_size=200, tooltip="Enter URL for tabletop image",
        value=currentURL
    })
end

function createSurfaceButtons()
    --Label
    self.createButton({
        label="Tabletop Surface Image", click_function="none",
        position={0,0,1}, height=0, width=0, font_size=300, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    --Functional
    self.createButton({
        label="Apply Image\nTo Table", click_function="click_applySurface",
        function_owner=self, tooltip="Apply URL as table image",
        position={2,0,4}, height=440, width=1400, font_size=200,
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Save Image\nTo Memory", click_function="click_saveSurface",
        function_owner=self, tooltip="Record URL into memory (requires nickname)",
        position={-2,0,4}, height=440, width=1400, font_size=200,
    })
    --Label
    self.createButton({
        label="Load From Memory", click_function="none",
        position={0,0,5.5}, height=0, width=0, font_size=300, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    --Saves, created dynamically from memory file
    for i, memoryEntry in ipairs(tableImageData) do
        --Load
        local funcName = i.."loadMemory"
        local func = function(x,y) click_loadMemory(x,y,i) end
        self.setVar(funcName, func)
        self.createButton({
            label=memoryEntry.name, click_function=funcName,
            function_owner=self, tooltip=memoryEntry.url, font_size=200,
            position={-0.6,0,6.5+0.5*(i-1)}, height=240, width=3300,
        })
        --Delete
        local funcName = i.."deleteMemory"
        local func = function(x,y) click_deleteMemory(x,y,i) end
        self.setVar(funcName, func)
        self.createButton({
            label="DELETE", click_function=funcName,
            function_owner=self, tooltip="",
            position={3.6,0,6.5+0.5*(i-1)}, height=240, width=600,
            font_size=160, font_color={1,0,0}, color={0.8,0.8,0.8}
        })
    end
end

function createScaleInput()
    self.createInput({
        label=string.char(8644), input_function="none", function_owner=self,
        alignment=3, position={-8.5,0,2}, height=224, width=400,
        font_size=200, tooltip="Table Width",
        value=round(obj_side_top.getScale().x, 1)
    })
    self.createInput({
        label=string.char(8645), input_function="none", function_owner=self,
        alignment=3, position={-7.5,0,2}, height=224, width=400,
        font_size=200, tooltip="Table Depth",
        value=round(obj_side_lef.getScale().x, 1)
    })
end

function createScaleButtons()
    --Labels
    self.createButton({
        label="Table Scale", click_function="none",
        position={-8,0,1}, height=0, width=0, font_size=300, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=string.char(8644).."            "..string.char(8645),
        click_function="none",
        position={-8,0,2}, height=0, width=0, font_size=300, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Move Hands:", click_function="none",
        position={-8.3,0,3}, height=0, width=0, font_size=200, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    --Disabled due to me removing the feature for technical reasons
    --[[
    self.createButton({
        label="Scale Hands:", click_function="none",
        position={-8.3,0,4}, height=0, width=0, font_size=200, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    ]]
    --Checkboxes
    local label = ""
    if checkData.move == true then label = string.char(10008) end
    self.createButton({
        label=label, click_function="click_checkMove",
        function_owner=self, tooltip="Check to move hands when table is rescaled",
        position={-6.8,0,3}, height=224, width=224, font_size=200,
    })
    --[[
    local label = ""
    if checkData.scale == true then label = string.char(10008) end
    self.createButton({
        label=label, click_function="click_checkScale",
        function_owner=self, tooltip="Check to scale the width of hands when table is rescaled",
        position={-6.8,0,4}, height=224, width=224, font_size=200,
    })
    ]]
    --Apply button
    self.createButton({
        label="Apply Scale", click_function="click_applyScale",
        function_owner=self, tooltip="Apply width/depth to table",
        position={-8,0,4}, height=440, width=1400, font_size=200,
    })
end

local randomized = false

function onObjectRandomize(obj, color)
    if obj ~= self then return end
    if not randomized then
        randomized = true
        Wait.condition(rollFinished, || obj.resting)
    end
end

function rollFinished()
    randomized = false
    self.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(0)
end

ObjectStates.Description: 切换战场按钮区域设置前请不要使用

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.Description:
【死神】
种族: 神
神话: 基督教 
标签: 
祭品: 0
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
--[[
    【神魔卡脚本 - 死神】
    已适配 Global v11.3 
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 卡牌基础属性配置
-- ========================================================
UNIT_ID = "sm17"
-- [基础数值]
DEFAULT_ATK = 180000
DEFAULT_HP  = 400000

-- [身份信息] 
RACE = "神"          -- 种族
HERO_NAME = "死神"     -- 角色真名
Mythology = "基督教 "  --神话体系
TAGS = ""

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 0        
IS_SUPREME  = false      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = nil 

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true

-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 4        
IS_SUPREME  = false      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = nil 

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
--[[
    【法术卡通用脚本】
    适配 Global v11.0 系统
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 配置区 (每张卡只需修改这里)
-- ========================================================

-- 法术 ID (必须与 Excel 表格第一列一致)
-- 例如: "fs15" (如来佛之怒), "fs1" (法天象地)
SPELL_ID = "fs3" 

-- ========================================================

function onLoad()

-- 例如: "fs15" (如来佛之怒), "fs1" (法天象地)
SPELL_ID = "fs24" 

-- ========================================================

function onLoad()
    -- 1. 自动设置提示信息
    -- (这里只是为了鼠标指上去方便看，不影响功能)
    self.setDescription("【法术卡】\nID: " .. SPELL_ID .. "\n请放入法术区域以发动。")
    
    -- 2. 防止意外
    -- 法术卡通常不需要像神魔卡那样显示数值按钮，所以这里保持干净
    self.clearButtons()
end

-- (法术卡不需要 getBaseStats 或 setUIDisplay 等函数，
--  因为 Global 脚本是直接读取 SPELL_ID 然后去查数据库的)

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Board
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- ================= Base64 编码/解码库 =================
-- 用于生成和解析卡组代码，无需修改这部分
local b='ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/'

function base64_encode(data)
    return ((data:gsub('.', function(x) 
        local r,b='',x:byte()
        for i=8,1,-1 do r=r..(b%2^i-b%2^(i-1)>0 and '1' or '0') end
        return r;
    end)..'0000'):gsub('%d%d%d?%d?%d?%d?', function(x)
        if (#x < 6) then return '' end
        local c=0
        for i=1,6 do c=c+(x:sub(i,i)=='1' and 2^(6-i) or 0) end
        return b:sub(c+1,c+1)
    end)..({ '', '==', '=' })[#data%3+1])
end

function base64_decode(data)
    data = string.gsub(data, '[^'..b..'=]', '')
    return (data:gsub('.', function(x)
        if (x == '=') then return '' end
        local r,f='',(b:find(x)-1)
        for i=6,1,-1 do r=r..(f%2^i-f%2^(i-1)>0 and '1' or '0') end
        return r;
    end):gsub('%d%d%d?%d?%d?%d?%d?%d?', function(x)
        if (#x ~= 8) then return '' end
        local c=0
        for i=1,8 do c=c+(x:sub(i,i)=='1' and 2^(8-i) or 0) end
        return string.char(c)
    end))
end

-- ================= 逻辑区域 =================

local selectedCounts = {}
local guidToIndexMap = {}
-- 【修复1】新增一个状态锁变量
local isSpawning = false

-- 定义UI元素的常量，方便管理
local BTN_BUILD_IDX = 0
local BTN_RESET_IDX = 1
local BTN_TOTAL_IDX = 2
local BTN_EXPORT_IDX = 3
local BTN_IMPORT_IDX = 4
local CARD_BTN_START_IDX = 5 -- 卡牌计数按钮的起始索引

-- 输入框的索引（因为只有一个输入框，所以在inputs列表中它是第1个，索引通常为0）
local INPUT_IDX = 0

-- 【新增】用于存储输入框内容的变量
local currentDeckCode = ""

function onLoad()
    -- 初始化计数器和GUID到索引的映射表
    for i, data in ipairs(cardConfig) do
        selectedCounts[data.guid] = 0
        guidToIndexMap[data.guid] = i
    end

    Wait.frames(function() initUI() end, 2)
end

function initUI()
    local btn_y = 0.6
    
    -- 1. 创建主按钮：生成卡组
    self.createButton({
        click_function = "clickBuildDeck", function_owner = self,
        label = "生成卡组", position = {6, btn_y, 1.5}, rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        width = 1500, height = 600, font_size = 300,
        color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2}, font_color = {1, 1, 1},
        tooltip = "校验并生成卡组 (" .. MIN_DECK_COUNT .. "-" .. MAX_DECK_COUNT .. "张)"
    })

    -- 2. 创建副按钮：重置计数
    self.createButton({
        click_function = "clickReset", function_owner = self,
        label = "重置计数", position = {6, btn_y, 0.5}, rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        width = 1500, height = 400, font_size = 200,
        color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2}, font_color = {1, 1, 1},
        tooltip = "清空当前所有选择"
    })

    -- 3. 总数显示标签
    self.createButton({
        click_function = "click_none", function_owner = self,
        label = "当前数量: 0", position = {6, btn_y, 2.5}, rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        width = 0, height = 0, font_size = 250, font_color = {1, 1, 1},
        tooltip = "当前已选卡牌总数"
    })

    -- 4. 新增：导出代码按钮
    self.createButton({
        index = BTN_EXPORT_IDX,
        click_function = "clickExportDeck", function_owner = self,
        label = "生成代码", position = {6.5, btn_y, 4}, rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        width = 1200, height = 350, font_size = 180,
        color = {0.2, 0.5, 0.8}, font_color = {1, 1, 1},
        tooltip = "为当前选择的卡组生成代码"
    })

    -- 5. 新增：导入代码按钮
    self.createButton({
        index = BTN_IMPORT_IDX,
        click_function = "clickImportDeck", function_owner = self,
        label = "导入代码", position = {3.5, btn_y, 4}, rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        width = 1200, height = 350, font_size = 180,
        color = {0.8, 0.5, 0.2}, font_color = {1, 1, 1},
        tooltip = "从输入框中的代码直接生成卡组"
    })

    -- 6. 新增：卡组代码输入框
    self.createInput({
        input_function = "onInputChange", function_owner = self,
        label = "卡组代码", position = {5, btn_y, 5}, rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        width = 3000, height = 300, font_size = 150,
        color = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3}, font_color = {1, 1, 1},
        tooltip = "在此处粘贴卡组代码",
        value = "",
        validation = 1, -- 【关键修复】设置验证为1(None)，允许输入字母和符号
        index = INPUT_IDX
    })

    -- 7. 创建各卡牌计数按钮
    for i, data in ipairs(cardConfig) do
        local funcName = "click_card_func_" .. i
        _G[funcName] = function(obj, color, alt_click)
            onCardClicked(i, color, alt_click)
        end
        
        local worldPos = {data.pos[1], data.pos[2] + BUTTON_HEIGHT_OFFSET, data.pos[3]}
        local localPos = self.positionToLocal(worldPos)
        localPos.x = -localPos.x

        self.createButton({
            click_function = funcName, function_owner = self,
            label = "0", position = localPos, rotation = {0, 180, 0},
            width = 180, height = 180, font_size = 160,
            color = {1, 1, 1, 0.9},
            tooltip = data.name .. "\n(左键+ / 右键-)\nMax: " .. data.max
        })
    end
end

-- 空函数，用于不可点击的按钮
function click_none() end

-- 【关键修复】输入框回调，记录用户输入的值
function onInputChange(obj, color, value, selected)
    currentDeckCode = value
end

-- ======== 新增功能：卡组代码导入与导出 ========

-- 点击【生成代码】按钮
function clickExportDeck(obj, color)
    local deckParts = {}
    for guid, count in pairs(selectedCounts) do
        if count > 0 then
            local index = guidToIndexMap[guid]
            if index then
                table.insert(deckParts, index .. ":" .. count)
            end
        end
    end

    if #deckParts == 0 then
        broadcastToColor("您还没有选择任何卡牌！", color, {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    local deckString = table.concat(deckParts, ";")
    local deckCode = base64_encode(deckString)

    -- 【关键修复】使用 editInput 更新 UI 显示，并更新变量
    self.editInput({
        index = INPUT_IDX,
        value = deckCode
    })
    currentDeckCode = deckCode

    -- 在聊天栏直接打印代码，方便复制
    broadcastToAll("卡组代码已生成（请复制）：\n" .. deckCode, {0.2, 0.8, 1})
end

-- 点击【导入代码】按钮
function clickImportDeck(obj, color)
    -- 【关键修复】直接使用变量 currentDeckCode 获取值
    local deckCode = currentDeckCode

    if deckCode == nil or deckCode == "" then
        broadcastToColor("输入框中没有卡组代码！", color, {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    local deckString = base64_decode(deckCode)
    if deckString == nil or deckString == "" then
        broadcastToColor("无效的卡组代码格式！", color, {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    -- 重置当前选择
    resetCounters(true) -- silent reset

    local success = true
    -- 解析代码并设置卡牌数量
    for part in string.gmatch(deckString, "([^;]+)") do
        local index, count = part:match("^(%d+):(%d+)$")
        if index and count then
            index = tonumber(index)
            count = tonumber(count)
            local data = cardConfig[index]
            if data and count > 0 and count <= data.max then
                selectedCounts[data.guid] = count
            else
                broadcastToAll("警告：代码中包含无效的卡牌ID或数量超限，已跳过。", {1, 0.6, 0})
                success = false
            end
        end
    end

    -- 更新所有UI
    updateAllCardButtons()
    updateTotalLabel()

    if success then
        broadcastToColor("代码导入成功！正在为您生成卡组...", color, {0.2, 1, 0.2})
    else
        broadcastToColor("代码部分导入。请检查卡组后手动生成。", color, {1, 1, 0.2})
        return -- 如果有错误，则不自动生成
    end
    
    -- 自动开始生成流程
    clickBuildDeck(obj, color)
end

-- ======== UI与逻辑更新 ========

-- [重构] 更新所有卡牌按钮的标签和颜色
function updateAllCardButtons()
    for i, data in ipairs(cardConfig) do
        local count = selectedCounts[data.guid] or 0
        local btnIndex = CARD_BTN_START_IDX + i - 1
        local btnColor = {1, 1, 1, 0.9}
        if count > 0 then btnColor = {0.5, 1, 0.5, 1} end
        
        self.editButton({
            index = btnIndex,
            label = tostring(count),
            color = btnColor
        })
    end
end

-- 更新总数显示逻辑
function updateTotalLabel()
    local total = 0
    for k, v in pairs(selectedCounts) do total = total + v end
    
    local labelColor = {1, 1, 1}
    if total < MIN_DECK_COUNT then labelColor = {1, 1, 1}
    elseif total > MAX_DECK_COUNT then labelColor = {1, 0.2, 0.2}
    else labelColor = {0.2, 1, 0.2} end

    self.editButton({
        index = BTN_TOTAL_IDX,
        label = "当前数量: " .. total,
        font_color = labelColor
    })
end

-- 点击【重置】按钮
function clickReset(obj, color)
    resetCounters()
end

-- 卡牌点击回调
function onCardClicked(index, color, alt_click)
    local data = cardConfig[index]
    if not data then return end
    
    local guid = data.guid
    local current = selectedCounts[guid] or 0
    
    if alt_click then
        if current > 0 then current = current - 1 end
    else
        if current < data.max then
            current = current + 1
        else
            broadcastToColor("已达上限: " .. data.name, color, {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        end
    end
    
    selectedCounts[guid] = current
    local btnIndex = CARD_BTN_START_IDX + index - 1
    local btnColor = {1, 1, 1, 0.9}
    if current > 0 then btnColor = {0.5, 1, 0.5, 1} end

    self.editButton({
        index = btnIndex,
        label = tostring(current),
        color = btnColor
    })
    updateTotalLabel()
end

-- 生成卡组逻辑
function clickBuildDeck(obj, color)
    -- 【修复2】检查锁状态，防止重复点击
    if isSpawning then
        broadcastToColor("正在生成卡组中，请勿频繁点击...", color, {1, 0.5, 0})
        return
    end

    local total = 0
    for k, v in pairs(selectedCounts) do total = total + v end

    if total < MIN_DECK_COUNT then
        broadcastToAll("卡组数量不足！\n当前: " .. total .. " / 需要至少: " .. MIN_DECK_COUNT, {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    if total > MAX_DECK_COUNT then
        broadcastToAll("卡组数量超标！\n当前: " .. total .. " / 上限: " .. MAX_DECK_COUNT, {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        return
    end

    -- 【修复3】加锁
    isSpawning = true 
    
    broadcastToAll("验证通过 (" .. total .. "张)，正在生成...", {0.2, 1, 0.2})
    startLuaCoroutine(self, "spawnRoutine")
end

function spawnRoutine()
    local spawnPos = {TARGET_POS[1], TARGET_POS[2], TARGET_POS[3]}
    local rotation = {0, 180, 180}

    for i, data in ipairs(cardConfig) do
        local count = selectedCounts[data.guid] or 0
        if count > 0 then
            local cardObj = getObjectFromGUID(data.guid)
            if cardObj then
                for k = 1, count do
                    local newCard = cardObj.clone({
                        position = spawnPos,
                        rotation = rotation,
                        smooth = false
                    })
                    newCard.setLock(false)
                    newCard.interactable = true
                    spawnPos[2] = spawnPos[2] + 0.1 -- 稍微抬高防止堆叠穿模
                    coroutine.yield(0) -- 暂停一帧
                end
            else
                print("错误：找不到母版卡牌 " .. data.name .. " (" .. data.guid .. ")")
            end
        end
    end
    
    resetCounters(true) -- 生成后静默重置
    
    -- 【修复4】任务完成，解锁，并在公屏提示
    isSpawning = false 
    broadcastToAll("卡组生成完毕！", {0.2, 1, 0.2})
    
    return 1
end

-- 重置所有计数器
function resetCounters(silent)
    for i, data in ipairs(cardConfig) do
        selectedCounts[data.guid] = 0
    end
    
    -- 清空UI
    updateAllCardButtons()
    updateTotalLabel()
    
    -- 【关键修复】使用 editInput 清空输入框显示，并重置变量
    self.editInput({
        index = INPUT_IDX,
        value = ""
    })
    currentDeckCode = ""

    if not silent then
        broadcastToAll("计数器已重置。", {1, 0.8, 0.8})
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: CardCustom
ObjectStates.Description:
【孙悟空】
种族: 神、魔
神话: 佛教
标签: 七十二变  混世四猴  猴生肖
祭品: 5
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
--[[
    【神魔卡脚本 - 斗战胜佛 孙悟空】
    已适配 Global v11.3 
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 卡牌基础属性配置
-- ========================================================
UNIT_ID = "sm22"
-- [基础数值]
DEFAULT_ATK = 15000000
DEFAULT_HP  = 10000000

-- [身份信息] 
RACE = "神、魔"          -- 种族
HERO_NAME = "孙悟空"     -- 角色真名
Mythology = "佛教"  --神话体系
TAGS = "七十二变  混世四猴  猴生肖"

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 5        
IS_SUPREME  = true      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = "孙悟空"

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.Description:
【孙悟空】
种族: 神、魔
神话: 道教、佛教
标签: 七十二变 混世四猴 七大圣 猴生肖 取经团队
祭品: 3
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
--[[
    【神魔卡脚本 - 齐天大圣 孙悟空】
    已适配 Global v11.3 
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 卡牌基础属性配置
-- ========================================================
UNIT_ID = "sm1"
-- [基础数值]
DEFAULT_ATK = 1000000    
DEFAULT_HP  = 1200000    

-- [身份信息] 
RACE = "神、魔"          -- 种族
HERO_NAME = "孙悟空"     -- 角色真名
Mythology = "道教、佛教"  --神话体系
TAGS = "七十二变 混世四猴 七大圣 猴生肖 取经团队"

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 3          
IS_SUPREME  = false      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = nil 

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
【幻影分身】
由分身术生成的幻影
回合结束时消失
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
--[[
    【分身卡 / 幻影 Token 脚本】
    用于配合 [分身术] 法术使用
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 基础属性配置
-- ========================================================
-- [基础数值] (初始为0，主要靠Global脚本赋予数值)
DEFAULT_ATK = 0
DEFAULT_HP  = 0

-- [身份信息] 
RACE = "分身"
HERO_NAME = "幻影分身"
TAGS = "分身"

-- [状态]
local current_atk = 0
local current_hp  = 0
is_summoned = true -- ⭐ 关键：默认标记为“已召唤”，不需要祭品

function onLoad()
    -- 设置卡牌名称和描述
    self.setName(HERO_NAME)
    self.setDescription("【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n由分身术生成的幻影\n回合结束时消失")
    
    -- 创建数值显示按钮
    createStatButtons()
end

-- ========================================================
-- 2. 核心接口 (供 Global 脚本调用)
-- ========================================================

-- ⭐ 核心修复：解决 function <getSummonRequirements> 报错
-- 告诉 Global 脚本：这张卡不需要祭品 (cost=0) 且已经召唤成功 (is_summoned=true)
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = 0,
        is_supreme = false,
        precursor = nil,
        is_summoned = true 
    }
end

-- 获取基础属性
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
function getTags() return TAGS end

-- 确认召唤 (接口兼容)
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    return current_atk, current_hp
end

-- UI 开关 (被 Global 调用)
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then 
        createStatButtons() 
    else 
        self.clearButtons() 
    end
end

-- 更新数值显示 (被 Global 调用)
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or 0
    local newHp = params.hp or 0
    
    -- 只有数值变化时才更新按钮，节省性能
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end

-- ========================================================
-- 3. UI 工具函数 (与普通神魔卡保持一致)
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    
    -- 攻击力按钮 (红色)
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), 
        click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, 
        font_size = 180, font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    
    -- 生命值按钮 (绿色)
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), 
        click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, 
        font_size = 180, font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end

-- 数值格式化 (例如 10000 -> 1.0w)
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end

function null() end

ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
--[[
    【神魔卡脚本 - 恶魔】
    已适配 Global v11.3 
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 卡牌基础属性配置
-- ========================================================
-- [基础数值]
DEFAULT_ATK = 175000
DEFAULT_HP  = 400000

-- [身份信息] 
RACE = "魔"          -- 种族
HERO_NAME = "恶魔"     -- 角色真名
Mythology = "基督教 "  --神话体系
TAGS = ""

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 0        
IS_SUPREME  = false      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = nil 

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

-- 1. 卡牌基础属性配置
-- ========================================================
-- [基础数值]
DEFAULT_ATK = 175000
DEFAULT_HP  = 400000

-- [身份信息] 
RACE = "魔"          -- 种族
HERO_NAME = "恶魔"     -- 角色真名
Mythology = "基督教 "  --神话体系
TAGS = ""

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 0        
IS_SUPREME  = false      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = nil 

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
--[[
    【法术卡通用脚本】
    适配 Global v11.0 系统
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 配置区 (每张卡只需修改这里)
-- ========================================================

-- 法术 ID (必须与 Excel 表格第一列一致)
-- 例如: "fs15" (如来佛之怒), "fs1" (法天象地)
SPELL_ID = "fs22" 

-- ========================================================

function onLoad()
    -- 1. 自动设置提示信息
    -- (这里只是为了鼠标指上去方便看，不影响功能)
    self.setDescription("【法术卡】\nID: " .. SPELL_ID .. "\n请放入法术区域以发动。")
    
    -- 2. 防止意外
    -- 法术卡通常不需要像神魔卡那样显示数值按钮，所以这里保持干净
    self.clearButtons()
end

-- (法术卡不需要 getBaseStats 或 setUIDisplay 等函数，
--  因为 Global 脚本是直接读取 SPELL_ID 然后去查数据库的)

--[[
    【万能装备卡脚本】
    说明：修改 EQUIP_ID 即可。
]]
-- =================配置区=================
EQUIP_ID = 1  -- 修改 ID 切换装备 (例如 6=照妖镜)
-- =======================================

function onLoad()
    local names = {
        [1]="如意金箍棒", [2]="火尖枪", [3]="乾坤圈", [4]="金霞风火轮",
        [5]="混天绫", [6]="照妖镜", [7]="三尖两刃刀", [8]="雷神之锤",
        [9]="随心铁杆兵", [10]="战神金矛", [11]="海神三叉戟", [12]="月神弓箭"
    }
    self.setName(names[EQUIP_ID] or "装备")
    self.setDescription("放入装备栏生效")
end

    }

    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK

    self.createButton({

    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)

    else return tostring(n) end

ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
--[[
    【法术卡通用脚本】
    适配 Global v11.0 系统
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 配置区 (每张卡只需修改这里)
-- ========================================================

-- 法术 ID (必须与 Excel 表格第一列一致)
-- 例如: "fs15" (如来佛之怒), "fs1" (法天象地)
SPELL_ID = "fs22" 

-- ========================================================

function onLoad()
    -- 1. 自动设置提示信息
    -- (这里只是为了鼠标指上去方便看，不影响功能)
    self.setDescription("【法术卡】\nID: " .. SPELL_ID .. "\n请放入法术区域以发动。")
    
    -- 2. 防止意外
    -- 法术卡通常不需要像神魔卡那样显示数值按钮，所以这里保持干净
    self.clearButtons()
end

-- (法术卡不需要 getBaseStats 或 setUIDisplay 等函数，
--  因为 Global 脚本是直接读取 SPELL_ID 然后去查数据库的)

ContainedObjects.Description: 放入装备栏生效
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
--[[
    【万能装备卡脚本】
    说明：修改 EQUIP_ID 即可。
]]
-- =================配置区=================
EQUIP_ID = 1  -- 修改 ID 切换装备 (例如 6=照妖镜)
-- =======================================

function onLoad()
    local names = {
        [1]="如意金箍棒", [2]="火尖枪", [3]="乾坤圈", [4]="金霞风火轮",
        [5]="混天绫", [6]="照妖镜", [7]="三尖两刃刀", [8]="雷神之锤",
        [9]="随心铁杆兵", [10]="战神金矛", [11]="海神三叉戟", [12]="月神弓箭"
    }
    self.setName(names[EQUIP_ID] or "装备")
    self.setDescription("放入装备栏生效")
end

ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
--[[
    【神魔卡脚本 - 恶魔】
    已适配 Global v11.3 
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 卡牌基础属性配置
-- ========================================================
-- [基础数值]
DEFAULT_ATK = 175000
DEFAULT_HP  = 400000

-- [身份信息] 
RACE = "魔"          -- 种族
HERO_NAME = "恶魔"     -- 角色真名
Mythology = "基督教 "  --神话体系
TAGS = ""

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 0        
IS_SUPREME  = false      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = nil 

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

HERO_NAME = "白素贞"     -- 角色真名
Mythology = ""  --神话体系
TAGS = ""

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 1        
IS_SUPREME  = false      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = nil 

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end

标签: 阿斯加德  瓦尔哈拉
祭品: 0
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
--[[
    【神魔卡脚本 - 英灵战士】
    已适配 Global v11.3 
]]

-- ========================================================
-- 1. 卡牌基础属性配置
-- ========================================================
UNIT_ID = "sm14"
-- [基础数值]
DEFAULT_ATK = 170000
DEFAULT_HP  = 700000

-- [身份信息] 
RACE = "神、骑士"          -- 种族
HERO_NAME = "英灵战士"     -- 角色真名
Mythology = "北欧 "  --神话体系
TAGS = "阿斯加德  瓦尔哈拉"

-- [召唤需求]
SUMMON_COST = 0        
IS_SUPREME  = false      
REQUIRED_PRECURSOR = nil 

-- ========================================================
-- 内部变量
-- ========================================================
local current_atk = DEFAULT_ATK
local current_hp  = DEFAULT_HP
is_summoned = false 

function onLoad()
    createStatButtons()
    self.setDescription(
        "【" .. HERO_NAME .. "】\n" ..
        "种族: " .. RACE .. "\n" ..
        "神话: " .. Mythology .. "\n" .. 
        "标签: " .. TAGS .. "\n" ..
        "祭品: " .. SUMMON_COST
    )
    
    if SUMMON_COST == 0 then is_summoned = true end
end
-- ========================================================
-- 核心接口 (供 Global 调用)
-- ========================================================
function getBaseStats() return DEFAULT_ATK, DEFAULT_HP end
function getRace() return RACE end
-- ⭐【新增接口】让 Global 能读取这张卡的标签
function getTags()
    return TAGS
end
function getSummonRequirements()
    return {
        cost = SUMMON_COST,
        is_supreme = IS_SUPREME,
        precursor = REQUIRED_PRECURSOR,
        is_summoned = is_summoned
    }
end
function confirmSummon(buffs)
    if buffs then
        current_atk = current_atk + (buffs.atk or 0)
        current_hp  = current_hp  + (buffs.hp or 0)
    end
    is_summoned = true
    broadcastToAll("⚡ " .. HERO_NAME .. " 已降临人界！", {1,1,0})
    return current_atk, current_hp
end
function toggleUI(params)
    if params.show then createStatButtons() else self.clearButtons() end
end
function setUIDisplay(params)
    local newAtk = params.atk or DEFAULT_ATK
    local newHp = params.hp or DEFAULT_HP
    
    if newAtk ~= current_atk or newHp ~= current_hp then
        current_atk = newAtk
        current_hp = newHp
        if self.getButtons() then
            self.editButton({index=0, label=formatNumber(current_atk)})
            self.editButton({index=1, label=formatNumber(current_hp)})
        else
            createStatButtons() 
        end
    end
end
-- ========================================================
-- UI 工具函数
-- ========================================================
function createStatButtons()
    if self.getButtons() then return end
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_atk), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {-0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 0.9} 
    })
    self.createButton({
        label = formatNumber(current_hp), click_function = "null", function_owner = self,
        position = {0.60, 0.2, 1.5}, width = 600, height = 300, font_size = 180,
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}, color = {0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 0.9}
    })
end
function formatNumber(num)
    if not num then return "0" end
    local n = tonumber(num)
    if n >= 10000 then return string.format("%.1fw", n/10000)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return string.format("%.1fk", n/1000)
    else return tostring(n) end
end
function null() end
